subject: Are you on Team Herschel?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4d28e7339e7448648008ead74ea74f1d&_e=qZEfuaEluAodJOKrUhKr6bAelOb3rkCaIQ7xFD3bfgBuD92VPUlkf-7COcv4O3k0DwJrKdSXONYDvuYhVx6hSk-WJx6ag1M70nSQtmGxd0BNEqylgebxi_Y1d7Nw45AWBq4X_DnL57F1-Rz_dXyKEGkzuHZMeVtfEqr3N2uJh4Gxo-pfln3R4-hnKkFyrjm60waKzybMlNbgcLK9GkZrczvD3-Nzd2UWFLl_hjyzZ_QUW-xO30dQ59VjsJE_U1zePjiV2wqprOiYSgWbA2ffWnRnToKY3ZhKKOB1OydqXB0ZujZKLsUVRQyDxC_bN2og05KXODHpYPVIy_45K-rtx8fvk-KPBQA-Tgd6Rs1VUF_GFa58a3G149sBAtlhw0i0tDHyPZAfa2iEg1NHmqf9a_OhD2svzfUjyraOqD03cybiilwR2OHdft9OyfT_HLUUG-dy9VW66IuDB-TA01oG9Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4d28e7339e7448648008ead74ea74f1d&_e=qZEfuaEluAodJOKrUhKr6bAelOb3rkCaIQ7xFD3bfgBuD92VPUlkf-7COcv4O3k0DwJrKdSXONYDvuYhVx6hSk-WJx6ag1M70nSQtmGxd0BNEqylgebxi_Y1d7Nw45AWBq4X_DnL57F1-Rz_dXyKEGkzuHZMeVtfEqr3N2uJh4Gxo-pfln3R4-hnKkFyrjm60waKzybMlNbgcLK9GkZrczvD3-Nzd2UWFLl_hjyzZ_QUW-xO30dQ59VjsJE_U1zeJgklyKbIeOCZxstZrajCYI1NZKWisqzZgGOCo-w1KAiIu1uqgoWCpSXgS-RcGgxC7fvqwadN3fRD_1OzthiPfH6McyRdyEFnWrFsC7PKbFB5CupsTkgj99gwkTQd3AvncNNdE-J3MwbKQk9CICbjS1h6Xf7rYfOTGXcCLL90ZKt4MvQVaHpUYvQp0PzJuLuYcNdN0TDd9K9TKGGZGaPcyg%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4d28e7339e7448648008ead74ea74f1d&_e=qZEfuaEluAodJOKrUhKr6bAelOb3rkCaIQ7xFD3bfgBuD92VPUlkf-7COcv4O3k0DwJrKdSXONYDvuYhVx6hSk-WJx6ag1M70nSQtmGxd0BNEqylgebxi_Y1d7Nw45AWBq4X_DnL57F1-Rz_dXyKEGkzuHZMeVtfEqr3N2uJh4Gxo-pfln3R4-hnKkFyrjm60waKzybMlNbgcLK9GkZrczvD3-Nzd2UWFLl_hjyzZ_QUW-xO30dQ59VjsJE_U1zeCqtLT3I42Hg9EGyHa4ZK2i1LnWxqf0fCT1Y7-iUMcUnq4FPQoiadMzA8qPi_R2-ibOXyheGnfKlwzipU_gRykuCLedmKtngNDlNnD72HGAcyq3f3qDolwXHLOib9IYmaHCEaZaacYdNh1l_jFWOgDi2nu71WEWy2fXTL908LpDsBy8N9x9wSL2-PL00zZNBEmAl6eVE0vd163b_K9t8P6Q%3D%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Biden's border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) Peter, The Biden border crisis is worse than it has _**EVER**_ been. In June, 180,000 illegal immigrants crossed the U.S.-Mexico border. In July, U.S. Border Patrol reported nearly 200,000 illegal immigrants crossing into America -- the **HIGHEST** number in more than two decades. **And today America functionally has OPEN BORDERS thanks to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and we 're on pace for 2 MILLION PEOPLE to cross illegally into our country.** [**Joe Biden and radical Democrats refuse to enforce the law -- and America is paying the price. We _must_ do everything in our power to ensure that we take control of the Senate next fall and send good Republicans to Washington to fight alongside me. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) **_Last year, thanks to President Trump and a responsible Republican Senate, we had the lowest rate of illegal immigration in 45 years._** But Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and radical Democrats in Congress have destroyed America's border and homeland security in just MONTHS. It's gotten so severe, the United States Supreme Court had to intervene by reversing Biden's decision to end the Trump-era "Remain in Mexico" policy. This international agreement, negotiated between President Trump with the government of Mexico, requires illegal immigrants who crossed the border to stay in Mexico while their asylum cases are adjudicated in the United States. [**We must end this Biden border crisis, which is why I 'm counting on your help to WIN the Republican majority in 2022 ... to RESTORE our border security ... and to END the Democrats' dangerous immigration policies. Will you make your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more right now?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) As soon as they took power in D.C., Democrats immediately stopped construction on President Trump's border wall. They reinstated the failed policy of "catch and release" which sends illegal immigrants, many of whom are sick with COVID, into our communities. And they ended the incredibly successful "Remain in Mexico" international agreement, which meant people who entered Mexico illegally then crossed into the U.S. would stay in Mexico -- **NOT America** -- while their cases were pending. **_Unlike Joe Biden, I have been to the U.S.-Mexico border this year because I care about keeping America safe and keeping our border secure ... and I've seen the CRISIS that Democrats' damaging and cruel policies have created._** **_Peter_**[**, please help me TODAY with your gift of $15, $25, $50, $100, or more as I fight to SECURE OUR BORDER and win back the Republican majority in the critical election next year.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) [**Donate today - help stop the border crisis!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58205855:62DWlN2Nd:m:1:3253819041:D526183D3B5BD6C4408AB8799742BF4F:r) For Liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

body:

Peter,

We're now counting down from just 3 weeks out from Election Day in the recall against failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

Voting by mail has been going on for over a week now. Every day that goes by means thousands of more ballots are being returned with votes for, or against, the recall.

With the election coming down to a "photo finish," [**we can 't miss a single opportunity to get out every YES vote we can for the recall.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206112:6nEe2N2tN:m:1:3253819041:189506CC6528D93F273A7EAAE599E48E:r)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Would you support a COVID vaccine mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 28TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206321:6mmyGN2Nw:m:1:3253819041:36A400888F079810D0F0CBAB74FC3DF6:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Gov. DeSantis just might be the worst governor in America. But don’t take our word for it -- check out his record for yourself:
❌ | He’s a **hyper-partisan who owes his gubernatorial victory to Donald Trump’s endorsement** \-- to return the favor, he’s willing to say or do whatever it takes to keep Donald Trump happy.
---|---
❌ | Throughout the pandemic, he opposed **stimulus checks, tax cuts, and aid for local governments** , despite _overwhelming support_ from Floridians.
❌ | He’s stoked **anti-science sentiment** and banned businesses from requiring vaccines to protect their customers and employees.
❌ | He **put our children and teachers in harm’s way** by attempting to ban schools from implementing mask requirements (but a Florida judge struck this down yesterday!).
❌ | Because of low vaccination rates, **Florida is now the epicenter of the COVID-19 pandemic** , accounting for more than 20% of _all cases nationwide._

name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teacher RESIGNS over CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
School boards around the country are losing their minds.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206345:JkSMwN2NM:m:1:3253819041:D05C3BB43F342FF0A169C401561517E0:r)
---
Peter,

What happens when a teacher stands up to Critical Race Theory?

_She's forced out of her job by power-hungry monsters._

**Laura Morris, an elementary teacher in Loudoun County, Virginia, had this to say when she tearfully resigned at a school board meeting:_" I'm a Christian woman, and they've said they don't want us here. I've found employment elsewhere."_**

If we don't start standing WITH teachers like her and standing AGAINST Critical Race Theory propagandists, we'll lose ALL the good teachers.

_We stand with Laura Morris and other teachers across the country who are bravely standing up to Critical Race Theory._ **_Do YOU?_**

**[DONATE HERE to help us FIGHT BACK against teachers' unions and school boards that are FORCING Critical Race Theory on teachers AND students. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206345:JkSMwN2NM:m:1:3253819041:D05C3BB43F342FF0A169C401561517E0:r)**

**If the Left indoctrinates our children today, we'll lose America tomorrow.**

The power-hungry unions and radical school board members do not represent us. They are ENEMIES of free thought, objective truth, and the American ideal that all men are created EQUAL.

These failures were elected by We The People - and We The People will REMOVE them.

We need your help, Peter. We need to show these hero teachers who have put their livelihoods on the line for our children that they're not alone. **_WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK._**

**_[Please DONATE NOW to help us stand up to these Critical Race Theory propagandists in the school board and teachers' unions. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206345:JkSMwN2NM:m:1:3253819041:D05C3BB43F342FF0A169C401561517E0:r)_**

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Good morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Good morning, Peter --

We know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so we’re going to keep this message short. Thanks in advance for taking the time to read it.

The truth is, the vast majority of our donations come from a whole bunch of folks giving small donations in response to emails like this one. The average donation to one of these messages tends to hover around $18, give or take. That makes these requests so important, especially when we’re tracking behind on our fundraising goals.

Our budget crunch comes at a time when Republican attacks on Sarah are becoming more personal and more frequent. It’s clear that our campaign is being watched very closely by Ron Johnson’s allies back in Washington. We’ll need to collect a significant amount of resources to fight back, but first, we need your help to catch up to our goals.

**[Add a donation of any amount -- like $3 or $18 (our average contribution) -- to ensure we have the resources to respond to these Republican attacks directly and defeat Ron Johnson. clean_body: Good morning, Peter -- We know your time is valuable, especially on the weekend, so we’re going to keep this message short. Thanks in advance for taking the time to read it. The truth is, the vast majority of our donations come from a whole bunch of folks giving small donations in response to emails like this one. The average donation to one of these messages tends to hover around $18, give or take. That makes these requests so important, especially when we’re tracking behind on our fundraising goals. Our budget crunch comes at a time when Republican attacks on Sarah are becoming more personal and more frequent. It’s clear that our campaign is being watched very closely by Ron Johnson’s allies back in Washington. We’ll need to collect a significant amount of resources to fight back, but first, we need your help to catch up to our goals. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = You’re probably getting a lot of requests coming through your inbox right now, Peter. Derek,

Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.

Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. And right now, we’re falling short of our goal.

**[Having Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race is really bad news. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWsOcOVS1i-U-aRZW21ulItUBL3guivVdOcctGMgfWOL0rPkEJpWC9zd9-5d6HDyW_UPJPfBM64XOqjnwd2LcTSqSvoAUbUb44_MehSuQw_y6rkzyG0NcwdJju0ZlZ0QZqHCwVJ5ilhsA1cVmtYeOObUrpGtMYp6qGkQTH6W-O9BmaPxI3bc8-5N8Vx0YTUtAkRwzmISCGOpNyDvvr1EAVfJWZY5yOEVebHwbQV8DCi7UPTDXk2zTjEeYgQqKScnt6JN_t1_JvUNr3uLzZTdIgvGd3nQ0uB2GQeVjTvV8GPk4Xz7wdM0-ZYgf26sBKwXsJw/3eu/vfI_hoEuQtmv0YuJmkKUDw/h2/guiN82OMGxUzpleinUqFyMs6wLKDfftDlyZhhmBAnAI)**

Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.

We need people like you to give $25 or what you can right now -- before our deadline -- to show our strength.

Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. **[Will you please split $25 between Common Good VA and me right now to protect our fragile Democratic Senate majority? name: Joe Mantegna
subject: We have a responsibility to honor their valor
body:
Hi Peter, this is Joe Mantegna. You might know me from movies or TV as Joey Zasa in _The_ _Godfather_ , the voice of Fat Tony in _The Simpsons_ , or Special Agent David Rossi in the CBS series _Criminal Minds._ But what you may not know about me is that off-screen, I try to spend time raising awareness and appreciation for those who risked their lives so that we can live in freedom. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) You see, out of the millions of brave men and women who served in World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, only about 6% are still with us today. _Most of the World War II veterans still alive are nearing or past 100 years old ... most of our Korean War veterans are in their 90s... and most of our Vietnam veterans are in their 70s and 80s._ Sadly, with hundreds of these heroes passing away every day, time is short to preserve their first-hand lessons and experiences from which future generations can learn. That's why today, I'm asking fellow patriotic Americans like yourself to help my friends at the American Veterans Center with a special, time-sensitive project -[ **to record the personal stories of our heroic veterans from our World War II generation before it 's too late. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) _You and I understand that freedom is not free and that its price is the blood and sacrifice of generations willing to stand and serve._ **I learned those lessons from my Uncle Willie who served in General Patton 's Third Army in World War II** - _he even earned a Purple Heart for the injuries he sustained in the Battle of the Bulge._ But what I didn't realize until later in life is that the war stories he told me weren't just about him... They were about honoring and remembering his brothers in arms who never made it back home... the ones who never got a chance to re-start their lives like he did. I knew then that whatever I chose to do in life was because of their valor - _and I knew that I had a responsibility to honor that valor._ So, almost fifteen years ago when I met Jim Roberts - President of the American Veterans Center - I was immediately glad to offer any help I could to help honor our veterans and military heroes. You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That's why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these "Oral Histories", they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress' Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you've ever watched one of AVC's Oral Histories, you'll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include:
* **The 442nd Regimental Combat Team** - Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts.
* **The Ritchie Boys** - A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler.
* **Royce Williams** - The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight.
* **Rosie the Riveters** - The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines.

These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it's too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History - from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America's greatest heroes. [**So, will you help my friends at the AVC record the Oral Histories of as many living WWII veterans as possible with a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it's going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. [**That 's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting the AVC Oral History Project with a tax-deductible gift of $15, $35, $50 or more today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) If you can give more - such as $75, $100, or even $500 - that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. _ _ Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer [**SUPPORT THE AVC**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206988:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206990:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206991:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206992:6997KN2FN:m:1:3253819041:EEC15B566882A62BD72EAFDEE89B3B0B:r)
---|---|---

1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

body:
I have a track record of getting things done -- paying a $15 minimum wage to bringing together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks arena.

Peter,

I’m going to be clear when I say defeating Ron Johnson next year is critical to holding on to our majority in the Senate and passing key legislation that will help millions of Wisconsinites. **[Before I continue, I’m asking you to chip in $5 to my campaign to help win this crucial election>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34805957/303123009/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210828FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2U2OWEzMi0xMTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PK5AsK0XBmGJW3RNC4ph2cpkV4-5eHUhthpa0Otu2RU=)**

Ron Johnson’s career can be boiled down to one word: **_Obstructionist._**

He’s become a roadblock for any and all progress in our country, and continues to vote against historic legislation like the bipartisan infrastructure bill that would create good-paying jobs across Wisconsin.

I have a track record of getting things done -- from paying a $15 minimum wage to bringing together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks arena. **I know what it takes to work hard and work for the people, not the special interests.**

That’s why I’m coming to you directly to ask for your help in defeating Ron Johnson. **With a donation of $5 or more today, you’ll help us meet our $20,000 August online fundraising goal and beat Johnson.

You can use this link to give:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_aug2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34805958/303123011/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210828FR_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2U2OWEzMi0xMTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PK5AsK0XBmGJW3RNC4ph2cpkV4-5eHUhthpa0Otu2RU=)**

Thank you,

Alex

body:
Nice to meet you, Peter! 👋

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806172/303123932/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=)
---
Peter,

At _**Barrier to Entry PAC**_ and _**Pay Your Interns PAC**_ , we pride ourselves in authentically living our values as we work together to build a more equitable, inclusive government -- starting with dismantling socioeconomic barriers to entry into the political space.

Our two sister PACs began as a passion project led by a trifecta of three determined young women who share the vision of achieving meaningful social change through lifting up the voices of everyday people. In just 6 months, we have built a community dedicated to making sure working-class people have a seat at the table in Democratic politics.

_**And as a truly scrappy, grassroots movement, your advocacy and support is critical to our success -- which is why we want to make sure you feel like part of the team by personally introducing ourselves to you today!**_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806173/303123933/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_imghead&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806174/303123934/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=)
**Eden McKissick-Hawley, Founder**
After working as a campaign manager and finance director for women running for office, Eden saw the impacts of a system designed to keep working people on the sidelines. Time and time again, she heard the same questions being asked of her candidates by national groups: “How much money can you put into your own campaign?” “How quickly can you quit your job and campaign full time?” “How much money can you raise out of your personal network?” After the 2020 election cycle, she started an organization specifically designed to address systemic issues. Her ultimate goal is to lift up working-class and middle-class change makers rather than discouraging them from being a part of the political system. When Eden is not in a fit of rage over the state of American politics, she can be found making bagels, cooking, and spending time outside.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806175/303123935/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=)
**Megan Nien-Yun Clark, Digital Director**
As an advocate for a variety of social causes in her community and a former teacher who saw the effects of socioeconomic inequalities first-hand starting in the education system, Megan returned to grad school to get her Master’s Degree in Digital Communications from Syracuse University with a vision to leverage cause-driven messaging across online platforms. She comes to BTE/PYI from a digital consulting firm that specialized in fundraising for progressive campaigns and nonprofits. Having built comprehensive digital programs for members of Congress, state delegation officials, as well as up-and-coming political outsiders, Megan is excited to continue pursuing her passions for social impact and creative digital strategy with us. In her spare time, Megan loves hanging with her dog Butters, kayaking, hiking, reading, and yoga.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806176/303123936/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=)
**Jimena Esparza, Social Media Coordinator**
Jimena worked as a college and career advisor where she saw the massive socioeconomic inequalities that exist in our low-income communities and beyond. With several years of community organizing, Jimena comes to BTE/PYI with the firsthand knowledge of the deep distrust lower-income communities have with our elected officials on either side. Having seen the disconnect between our elected officials and working class communities, Jimena hopes to take part in transforming the system so that more people that look like members of the communities that shape our country can be represented in our election systems. In her spare time, Jimena enjoys hiking, camping, riding her bike, and cuddling with her cats, Walter and Nina.
* * *
**While the three of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values.**

[**That’s why we’re asking you today to pitch in anything you can to help us recruit volunteers, mobilize supporters, hire more staff, and garner as much grassroots advocacy as we can. Will you rush a contribution right now to help strengthen our movement and support our growing team?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806177/303123937/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=) **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34806178/303123938/1300596418?refcode=210828_FR_meettrifectateam_RS_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ZGVkYTlkLTExMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0aXdTtpNa9dsVHr4d-hKXkMZPP8oiqjGtk1l0h0yseM=)** Thanks for standing with us! **_Eden, Megan, and Jimena_**

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. clean_body: Nice to meet you, Peter! 👋 | | | = Peter, At Barrier to Entry PAC and Pay Your Interns PAC , we pride ourselves in authentically living our values as we work together to build a more equitable, inclusive government -- starting with dismantling socioeconomic barriers to entry into the political space. Our two sister PACs began as a passion project led by a trifecta of three determined young women who share the vision of achieving meaningful social change through lifting up the voices of everyday people. In just 6 months, we have built a community dedicated to making sure working-class people have a seat at the table in Democratic politics. And as a truly scrappy, grassroots movement, your advocacy and support is critical to our success -- which is why we want to make sure you feel like part of the team by personally introducing ourselves to you today! = = Eden McKissick-Hawley, Founder After working as a campaign manager and finance director for women running for office, Eden saw the impacts of a system designed to keep working people on the sidelines. Time and time again, she heard the same questions being asked of her candidates by national groups: “How much money can you put into your own campaign?” “How quickly can you quit your job and campaign full time?” “How much money can you raise out of your personal network?” After the 2020 election cycle, she started an organization specifically designed to address systemic issues. Her ultimate goal is to lift up working-class and middle-class change makers rather than discouraging them from being a part of the political system. When Eden is not in a fit of rage over the state of American politics, she can be found making bagels, cooking, and spending time outside. = Megan Nien-Yun Clark, Digital Director As an advocate for a variety of social causes in her community and a former teacher who saw the effects of socioeconomic inequalities first-hand starting in the education system, Megan returned to grad school to get her Master’s Degree in Digital Communications from Syracuse University with a vision to leverage cause-driven messaging across online platforms. She comes to BTE/PYI from a digital consulting firm that specialized in fundraising for progressive campaigns and nonprofits. Having built comprehensive digital programs for members of Congress, state delegation officials, as well as up-and-coming political outsiders, Megan is excited to continue pursuing her passions for social impact and creative digital strategy with us. In her spare time, Megan loves hanging with her dog Butters, kayaking, hiking, reading, and yoga. = Jimena Esparza, Social Media Coordinator Jimena worked as a college and career advisor where she saw the massive socioeconomic inequalities that exist in our low-income communities and beyond. With several years of community organizing, Jimena comes to BTE/PYI with the firsthand knowledge of the deep distrust lower-income communities have with our elected officials on either side. Having seen the disconnect between our elected officials and working class communities, Jimena hopes to take part in transforming the system so that more people that look like members of the communities that shape our country can be represented in our election systems. In her spare time, Jimena enjoys hiking, camping, riding her bike, and cuddling with her cats, Walter and Nina. While the three of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values. = ____= Thanks for standing with us! Eden, Megan, and Jimena ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

Senate Democrats have shown the American people that getting our country back on track is their number one priority. In the last few months, Democrats have passed legislation to provide critical relief for working-class people and families affected by COVID-19. The expansion of the Child Tax Credit took effect only a month ago, and already those monthly payments are making a positive difference in the fight against child poverty. The Child Tax Credit was a key part of the _American Rescue Plan_ — the $1.9 trillion relief package that every single Republican member of Congress voted against. It sent $1,400 direct payments to millions, extended unemployment benefits, and sped up vaccinations across the country. But we know that Mitch McConnell and his right wing allies will continue their work attempting to block our progress, which is why defending our Democratic Senate majority is so crucial. We must do everything we can to support Democrats in the upcoming midterm elections, because losing just one seat means handing control back to McConnell. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Are you on Team Herschel?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you're with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r)

---
Peter,

I've been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He's a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that's come across his desk in Washington.

He's pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That's just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you're with me, Peter. That's why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r) **

I've been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I've ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you'll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208235:6GnWHN24N:m:1:3253819041:D47C1656775AFD0981136DE5E6A165B4:r)

[

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Reminder: 🆘 State of Emergency! 🆘
body:
This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Friends,

We are in a State of Emergency and have been for a very long time. We are watching the disastrous Biden Administration destroy our Republic and our positive influence in the world, from the horrifying news of more Americans killed in Afghanistan to our never-ending crisis at the border.

Even here in Washington State we have unbelievable problems with a tyrannical governor. Desperation is also hitting our friends and families close to home.

I am concerned about the hearts and health of our people.

Everywhere I go across this district I am hearing from people in the most dire circumstances. Doctors, law enforcement officers, fire fighters, government workers, nurses, teachers, waitstaff, marijuana dispensaries, you name it! All losing their jobs because they don't want to receive the COVID vaccine or they have already had the virus and don't feel like they need it.

You should always be given the choice to make an informed decision about a vaccine, and should never have to choose between your livelihood or submission for one. Our medical freedoms are absolutely being infringed upon, and people are suffering from increased mental health issues because of the ocean of false and misleading information out there.

This must stop. It is insanity! Do not comply.

This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11.

Please do not lose heart. Do not lose hope. We must band together. We must link elbows and stay in the fight together!

body:
The truth of the matter is that leadership in DC is sorely lacking right now. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=df4a41d612384c08bd0eaabca3303dc4&_e=AqHklHC7OvnkYp2_tRmEjNhbxOAp-yHG5LAmezlD9xwl3VzPYsZRgEjqAuqBk2hCjimPhBp7rG61D-Ded_Ov3WTeoGFqtIxbNFamOfgAF_UpNjo5gCrt3JuXQMBeMMCnUnvnDD-IfkWJ71lY8ynVkVmfuAuI80xGiXh7Njo1FFjeJrVYWXQHLxXtDtL6J_nCcjw9yJgRZg9EGpokNTgx8w9nIZ9swr_WRUVLaP312k1zWpY_W3GF7w8VvhO07uu517MTJBcWAgPg1k38xTptTqBKMwtlazr163VJyLgpYVlmboBaTypyCIk-6HKFNk-guea8Zbtv3a-BT_gs3fV0G_pacGuRWKdTblDWFULymrFK5dsDBw2dmHuLb9ppMxuHOe8RKyLsnUcWjWIex6-np9MwlPS6hCdGkceNiHqRK0VJlbCJkH58xHDQNjKUJh0I3nLaEG46Fje-8cbD_Vkvkg%3D%3D)

Folks, don’t you want to be proud of America once again? An America where you know that the folks at the top are going to honor the Constitution? Where the folks at the top are going to ensure that the rest of the world knows that the when the United States is engaged in foreign conflict, we’re not going to leave until the mission is complete?

An America in which you feel no trepidation sending your kids outside to play in the streets is the America I grew up in; it’s the America in which Patty and I raised our daughter.

The left-wing extremists and their puppet administration in Washington have – in the last 8 months – brought embarrassment after embarrassment upon this great nation of ours, while bringing us to the verge of bankruptcy. **Oh, and have you checked the price of gas lately?**

The truth of the matter is that leadership in DC is sorely lacking right now. President Biden is seemingly accountable to no, which is one of the main reasons I’m running for the United States Senate. You see, we can take back the majority from the socialist Democrats by just winning one seat. One seat secures a Republican majority. **But I’ll tell you this, fellow conservative, it’s going to be an expensive endeavor, and** **[to get to the finish line I’m going to need your help.](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=df4a41d612384c08bd0eaabca3303dc4&_e=AqHklHC7OvnkYp2_tRmEjNhbxOAp-yHG5LAmezlD9xwl3VzPYsZRgEjqAuqBk2hCjimPhBp7rG61D-Ded_Ov3WTeoGFqtIxbNFamOfgAF_UpNjo5gCrt3JuXQMBeMMCnUnvnDD-IfkWJ71lY8ynVkVmfuAuI80xGiXh7Njo1FFjeJrVYWXQHLxXtDtL6J_nCcjw9yJgRZg9EGpokNTgx8w9nIZ9swr_WRUVLaP312k1zWpY_W3GF7w8VvhO07uu5Xv3Dbjp1Lemgp-sffhRmGkOXQEYSge4XAttM_7BY-oNFf2YDwDLy6-QKxw0ugIEaQskRpbTDKWICLkme4wHBakL9cw-4gwumjFhrp0YqcF1XNKqpTcIoX2m3GOhF1M8HnI3-2yORGsZ-QbzrxuX8w5lPFq9CJTnz_rtgsApqNfmkvG3iyTomAEsvR9-jHACMAPlwNzOCIp48Bj_Df2AeDA%3D%3D)**

**Our August end-of-month fundraising deadline is a few days away and I need to be honest with you, we’re definitely not going to hit our goal of raising $50k online this month at our current pace of fundraising.**

**With that in mind, I’m going to aim for small victories every day between now and then. I’ll consider today a good day if we can identify 100 conservatives to make a contribution to my people powered campaign.**

[ <<Help Me Reach My August Goal>>](http://links.mccloskeyforsenate.com/u/click?_t=1e2ca10b732d41a38216798ae8311f64&_m=df4a41d612384c08bd0eaabca3303dc4&_e=AqHklHC7OvnkYp2_tRmEjNhbxOAp-yHG5LAmezlD9xwl3VzPYsZRgEjqAuqBk2hCjimPhBp7rG61D-Ded_Ov3WTeoGFqtIxbNFamOfgAF_UpNjo5gCrt3JuXQMBeMMCnUnvnDD-IfkWJ71lY8ynVkVmfuAuI80xGiXh7Njo1FFjeJrVYWXQHLxXtDtL6J_nCcjw9yJgRZg9EGpokNTgx8w9nIZ9swr_WRUVLaP312k1zWpY_W3GF7w8VvhO07uu577fIKNEd2oZN5Amqgbr4EryYUAAKwYYS33ovIoHz2y9ucLke6GphPmP4Wc7CogBnddOvk0adB-w4vismfWkAsrUIztaHb5Rl5sO0AmFMEH5cVejASXbosEeUlvgqyP5LvTD4tZVvnv-yXpXaTZBnpWIngXW_dIEhRxFkRCV2np6YWVxFs8b7WzFaB5tfmTiiBNQzmPDA6PuXpHK5hhwLeQ%3D%3D)
**I appreciate your continued support. It means so much.

Thank you,
Mark McCloskey
The True Conservative for Senate**

| | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. An America where you know that the folks at the top are going to honor the Constitution? Where the folks at the top are going to ensure that the rest of the world knows that the when the United States is engaged in foreign conflict, we’re not going to leave until the mission is complete? An America in which you feel no trepidation sending your kids outside to play in the streets is the America I grew up in; it’s the America in which Patty and I raised our daughter. The left-wing extremists and their puppet administration in Washington have – in the last 8 months – brought embarrassment after embarrassment upon this great nation of ours, while bringing us to the verge of bankruptcy. Oh, and have you checked the price of gas lately? The truth of the matter is that leadership in DC is sorely lacking right now. President Biden is seemingly accountable to no, which is one of the main reasons I’m running for the United States Senate. You see, we can take back the majority from the socialist Democrats by just winning one seat. One seat secures a Republican majority. But I’ll tell you this, fellow conservative, it’s going to be an expensive endeavor, and Our August end-of-month fundraising deadline is a few days away and I need to be honest with you, we’re definitely not going to hit our goal of raising $50k online this month at our current pace of fundraising. With that in mind, I’m going to aim for small victories every day between now and then. I’ll consider today a good day if we can identify 100 conservatives to make a contribution to my people powered campaign. I appreciate your continued support. It means so much. Thank you, Mark McCloskey The True Conservative for Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails? ../../../../AppData/Local/Microsoft/Windows/INetCache/Content.Outlook/CDXXLE0C/

body:
| | |

Can you help me with something, friend? Our end-of-month deadline is this Tuesday, and we’re at a real risk of missing our August goal. It's critical that we build a strong foundation to show the strength of this campaign, but right now, we're still $10,000 behind. With top Republicans laser-focused on my race, we can't afford to fall short of any goal. News outlets across the country are predicting that this race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in Granite State history – **Republicans have already spent over $2 million on false ads against me, and that's just the tip of the iceberg.** Between now and November 2022, GOP interest groups and dark money super PACs will pump hundreds of millions of dollars into New Hampshire in an effort to unseat me and take back the Senate. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, making it one of the closest races in history, and now experts are calling my Senate seat the most vulnerable in the country. **[That's why I’m humbly asking you for help. If we're going to defend our Senate majority, it will take a grassroots effort from people like you, friend. name: Kevin Cate
subject: Let's talk strategy
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to Nikki’s campaign for Governor. First, I’m going to tell you why.

It’s as simple as this: we can’t wait until next fall to start investing in the one candidate who can defeat DeSantis.

Right now, we know that DeSantis is on track to spend $150 million on his re-election campaign. That’s because he’s been raising money across the country instead of leading our state through crisis. Most of that will be spent smearing Nikki.

Team, I know we can win this race if we act now to build the organization we’ll need to win. Please click here to chip in now and help us finish August strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=sat]

Let’s talk strategy for a minute. Nikki is the only Democrat to win statewide in Florida since 2012. If we hold and expand on our winning approach from 2018, we can stop DeSantis next year.

Folks, you’re the key to getting this done. By investing now, you’re ensuring we can try something new next year with an innovative and aggressive campaign against DeSantis.

I know this election seems like it’s far away, but the work needs to start now. If you’re in a position to give now, please click here to donate before the end of August. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-august-eom?refcode=sat]

Thanks,

Kevin Cate
Senior Advisor

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

With our August deadline quickly approaching, we’re a little short of where we need to be
#

Hi there! Malcolm's finance director, Catherine, here.
I'm reaching out to just our top supporters — including you — to ask if you can chip in before Tuesday's deadline.
If that's all you need to hear and you're ready to give, you can use this link:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_em_q32021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34810291/303139923/-353695395?refcode2=7f20abac-1b08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210828-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIwYWJhYy0xYjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTDGd3YApCCNxzT5UDheDGBjhAWOixnumJ3c85kap8c=)

And frankly, it's going to take a ton of resources to stay competitive in this race. We know Republicans will say and spend anything to keep this seat.
So we're hustling now to fund our budget to organize in all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties, and a big part of how we're doing that is with grassroots support from folks like you.

Falling short of my goal tonight means making some difficult decisions that could cost me this race and could cost Democrats the Senate.

**[Please, will you split a $5 donation between my grassroots team and Common Good VA before midnight? Hi there — It's Rebecca with Team Heinrich. My work and heart have been Afghanistan-focused for the past week. But I just got off the phone with our finance team, and I'm a little concerned: **Our average donation amount is lower than usual, so we're tracking behind our August fundraising goal.** That's a bit of a problem, because we set our budgets based on what we need to power our campaign. Every single dollar we get goes toward efforts like supporting Martin as he fights for workers and families, investing in online ads to reach voters, helping secure wins for New Mexico county parties, and re-electing people like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly in their battleground Senate races. I'm not saying the sky will fall if we miss our end-of-month goal. But we don’t want to scale back our crucial campaign operations even a little bit, and your support is what will help us keep it running on all cylinders. **So, will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us catch up?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34811389/303143182/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210828_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_RA_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGRjOWVlMy0xZjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K09mHy2XXuQKhVz3YntevqSubWJK7H4b6AfRIBIGLuY=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34811392/303143185/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210828_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_RA_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGRjOWVlMy0xZjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K09mHy2XXuQKhVz3YntevqSubWJK7H4b6AfRIBIGLuY=)

clean_body: Hi there — It's Rebecca with Team Heinrich. My work and heart have been Afghanistan-focused for the past week. But I just got off the phone with our finance team, and I'm a little concerned: Our average donation amount is lower than usual, so we're tracking behind our August fundraising goal. That's a bit of a problem, because we set our budgets based on what we need to power our campaign. Every single dollar we get goes toward efforts like supporting Martin as he fights for workers and families, investing in online ads to reach voters, helping secure wins for New Mexico county parties, and re-electing people like Raphael Warnock and Mark Kelly in their battleground Senate races. I'm not saying the sky will fall if we miss our end-of-month goal. But we don’t want to scale back our crucial campaign operations even a little bit, and your support is what will help us keep it running on all cylinders. So, will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us catch up? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Every dollar you give matters in our work to protect our public lands, address climate change with the urgency it requires, support refugees, and make our economy work for everyone. Thank you. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Tell the Senate to pass the John Lewis Rights Voting Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The March on Washington took place 58 years ago today.
#

The March on Washington took place 58 years ago today.
It was a pivotal moment in the Civil Rights movement that helped push our democracy toward justice and freedom.
But our fight for progress is not done.
In almost every state across this nation, including here in North Carolina, the most fundamental right, the right to vote is under attack. Congress must act immediately to protect voting rights.
**[Add your name to tell the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. The House just passed this bill to help protect our most basic right, and it’s time for our Senators to do right by our democracy and the people of this nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34811549/303143816/-1272684460?refcode2=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210828-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzIzZjBiNS0yMDA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HG-5QiwzZsJWX6S4M3ypCOCXs6EBhurz1DVEXRRqeR0=&emci=4867101d-1608-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**
When the March on Washington happened and Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. delivered his “I Have a Dream” speech, voter suppression was rampant.
Many African Americans -- especially African American women, like my mom Lou -- did not have access to the ballot box.
On this anniversary, I think about how hard my grandparents and my mother fought for the right to vote. It is an affront to them and all who marched for Civil Rights that elected officials today are trying to strip Americans of the right to vote.
I think about my sons and all of our children, and how important it is that the next generation have their voices heard. It is their right.
**[Tell the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act immediately. There is no better way to honor the legacy of those who marched than by ensuring the most basic right, the right to vote, is protected.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34811551/303143818/-1272684460?refcode2=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210828-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzIzZjBiNS0yMDA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HG-5QiwzZsJWX6S4M3ypCOCXs6EBhurz1DVEXRRqeR0=&emci=4867101d-1608-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**
I will be a tireless champion for voting rights and democracy in the Senate, and I know this legislation cannot wait. We must get this done now. Thank you for adding your voice, especially today.
\- Cheri Beasley
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34811553/303143820/-1272684460?refcode2=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210828-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzIzZjBiNS0yMDA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HG-5QiwzZsJWX6S4M3ypCOCXs6EBhurz1DVEXRRqeR0=&emci=4867101d-1608-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=2c23f0b5-2008-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=20912107)**

But Susan didn’t come to Congress to take safe votes — she came to fight for the Greater Lehigh Valley, and all Americans. That means being a champion for the issues that affect the district most, like infrastructure and lowering prescription drug prices. = | = | = | = | = | = With your support, we can keep Susan in Congress fighting for the Greater Lehigh Valley and the rest of the country. Thank you, Team Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. But she needs your support today -- her campaign runs on grassroots donations since she's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. = | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, **. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: John Fetterman
subject: I *guarantee* you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I swear I'm not saying this to scare you on this fine Saturday. But this is truly how high the stakes are:
#
I hate to sound alarmist, Peter, but I need to be totally honest with yinz:
**Flipping this seat blue + defending our slim Democratic majority will mean EVERYTHING in 2022.** Our success will determine if we can deliver on Joe Biden's agenda for working families — _or if Mitch McConnell will regain his stranglehold on the Senate and block any progress for working people and their families._
I *swear* I'm not saying this to scare you on this fine Saturday. But this is how high the stakes are. It's why I joined this race to represent PA in the Senate and gain that 51st vote that will unlock so much progress in our country.
**It's also why my campaign and I set a critically important goal to raise another $84,172 directly into the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before the month ends.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)
**As of now, we're still pretty far behind. And according to the records we have on file for you, Peter, you have yet to make your first contribution to our campaign.** That's why, with just three days to close this pretty sizable gap on our goal, I've just got to ask you:**
**
[**_Will you donate your first-ever $5 to the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before Tuesday's deadline? This special fund is all about building the strong, honest + inclusive campaign we'll need to flip this Senate seat in 2022._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)**
I know I may joke around sometimes, but I take public service incredibly seriously.
I believe it's a solemn responsibility to serve the people + families who built this country. But right now, Republicans — _and even a few Democrats_ — are failing to deliver on that promise.
If you trust me with your support today, I can offer you this: **I will fight relentlessly to flip this seat in 2022. And when we pull it off, I guarantee you I will NOT be a Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema-type senator.**
Instead, I would proudly cast that 51st vote Democrats need in the Senate to pass common-sense legislation and deliver President Biden’s agenda to the American people. 💪
[**_But we can't get there without your initial support, Peter. Will you please donate your first $5 or more right now to help reach our goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before it's too late?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)**
Thank you for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. We're about 33% of the way to our urgent goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund — and coming up short this month would make it that much easier for Republicans to hold this seat and obstruct our Democratic policies. [** _If you're with me, will you chip in anything you can to help close the gap on our goal? Thank you in advance for your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28777?refcode=em20210828-2427&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210828-2427-footer-test-ctrl&t=47&refcode2=2427_434096_iZk5Er&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=48&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=49&akid=2427%2E434096%2EiZk5Er)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Can I let you in on a secret, folks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34812584/303147474/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjI4YjEwNi0yMjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_9HT9MwtMMf0cS89LqtmGtGKKmD_BqPVOlen95pEhn4=)
Can I let you in on a secret, folks? I was not the obvious choice for the U.S. Senate. It’s true! Republicans mocked me as the “accidental senator,” my name recognition was a mere 3%, and newspapers printed headlines like “WTF?!!” after my appointment in 2009. Look, I get it. I was the “education guy” as the superintendent of Denver’s public schools. I had never even run for office. But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, and what our neighbors needed help with. I knew with the right team we could do some good in the Senate. And that’s exactly what we did. We rolled up our sleeves and got to work defending health care, expanding opportunity, and fighting off the GOP’s attacks. Now that we have a Democratic majority in Washington, we can finally overcome Mitch McConnell’s obstruction and make so much more progress. The only problem? All Washington Republicans have to do is flip one single Senate seat and they’re back in charge. **We cannot let Republicans in Washington flood this race with dark money and flip this seat red. name: Donna Imam
subject: Update: Texas GOP advances new voting restrictions
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34812654/303147772/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDUwYzAyZS0yMjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qf6GKHi3yXZAMLOV0kS-L03DqDonSp9q3J5F-re_zLA=)
**Texas GOP advances new voting restrictions**
_\- Texas Tribune_
Bad news, friend.

After stalling for months, Texas State Senate Bill 1 -- the GOP's notorious voter suppression restrictions bill -- passed this week in yet another special session, and will likely move to Governor Abbott's desk to be signed into law.

If you're outraged, you have every right to be. The hypocrisy is unbelievable.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34812655/303147773/77586780?refcode=em-82821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDUwYzAyZS0yMjA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qf6GKHi3yXZAMLOV0kS-L03DqDonSp9q3J5F-re_zLA=)
**No doubt this raises the stakes for Democrats' prospects across Texas. And fighting back at the ballot box means voter turnout is going to be _critical._**

This week, we got huge news from _The Cook Political Report with Amy Walters_ that there will likely be a blue district in the Austin area. That's important because it gives us a chance to drive HUGE turnout in 2022 and chip away at the GOP's edge at the state level -- including by going after Abbott directly.

This is how we win, friend. But we expect the GOP to do everything they can to muddy the waters and crush our chances in Austin. We need to gear up now:

[**It's time to fight back, friend. In response to this news, we set a goal of raising $35,000 to lay the groundwork for the largest field operation possible to mobilize voters in Austin, TX. Today I’m reaching out to let you know about the August end-of-month fundraising deadline which is coming up this Tuesday at midnight.

Last Wednesday, I sent you a note informing of you of my goal to raise $5k in the week between August 24th and August 31st. Well, I just looked, and we’ve only raised about $1,500. That’s not good enough, **_only because I’m going to be competing against one of the nations most endangered DEMS – Pelosi and Biden will raise MILLIONS for her._**

[**Do you think you could make a contribution to my campaign today in the amount of $12 or more? Hey Peter \- It’s Jamie, the campaign manager for Team Earls.

**I wanted to fill you in on some behind-the-scenes plans our campaign has for flipping GA-06, taking back control of the House, and getting America back on track next year.**

_[**Once you’re done reading, I hope you’ll chip in $5 so we can make the early investments necessary to make it all happen**.](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=8824bf4225d9447c8390981bc3fda9a4&_e=Gx3dzC1v33rL1zHoyyvpF3kD4m-vrCVNaTox0JW778fZWsISbRejs4UMutNXBak12Tvpcrud4007H6HMXkZNKsL32HwFZwLGDBe7135vU8IOUiG1lDsFiwhEmxTaEQipE8jK7A6VrMEse55A6KNL3IuTRJ4IkfRbWhUtLe82RE2JA046Xwg_tG2EczYVRxmQgIRCIbFy8g0AvdQ6g6SEWtC0gznzOwUqPhRNzKSRjldULU8KiX8bHSrMoys49UG3pWBEXldCgSmEmI3c5xPSATDaEIiP2RkLO21kVl3f9BA8DvYjsaMRbG_zyJT-YixSHVg9hHlbuCh-BThvD3BcrBXOORnI_uXFFjqYpYN57rk5wy-zQ78YZ9-PmUUSTL5NjPha3Xi6-YqD6y4A96tpAsxDd7MMY-BKRZDkNr_5O2YCUm-1bKzHz-sSZQKCKyAwTnAeICEl-TeIVEz06IJT-mIOZapU0xaqpc3Ku2_IY0QcnXUnWsFFwRzMEvVASBMI)_

Republicans don’t like to admit it, but Georgia is no longer a solid red state. The last election showed that Georgia voters are tired of all the party politics and infighting, so they took their votes across party lines and handed the election over to the Left.

**We can’t let Georgia be the reason Democrats control Washington...again.**

At their core, folks in Georgia don’t believe in the radical far-Left agenda Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi are pushing. You know it and I know it.

**Georgians want a new kind of conservative movement, so that’s what we’re giving them.**

But campaigns are expensive. If we want to turn the tide in 2022 and reclaim the House, here’s what we need to start investing in right now:
* _Purchasing yard signs_
* _Buying gas and snacks for our team_
* _Printing campaign and voter registration materials_
* _Building our grassroots army_
* _Running ads across the district_
* _Training volunteers_

That’s where you come in, Peter.

**Each yard sign costs us about $5 and reaches 100 people. Will you help us reach 100 more voters this month by making a $5 donation right now, Peter?******
[**CONTRIBUTE $5**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=8824bf4225d9447c8390981bc3fda9a4&_e=Gx3dzC1v33rL1zHoyyvpF3kD4m-vrCVNaTox0JW778fZWsISbRejs4UMutNXBak12Tvpcrud4007H6HMXkZNKsL32HwFZwLGDBe7135vU8IOUiG1lDsFiwhEmxTaEQipE8jK7A6VrMEse55A6KNL3IuTRJ4IkfRbWhUtLe82RE2JA046Xwg_tG2EczYVRxmQgIRCIbFy8g0AvdQ6g6SEWtC0gznzOwUqPhRNzKSRjldULU8KiX8bHSrMoys49UG3pWBEXldCgSmEmI3c5xPSATDaEIiP2RkLO21kVl3f9BBPC9MTVWCVqwv3kN-yBk9taEaKyj-ue02U6Sn4_8XLEniQIubZuBtQrpos-nkJz9C6AZynYRCp4UmQyLoFW1ImwpvNWApASD8W9MNIARdpJ6RcFyVLz99Ff57zvCOenlwkgqr5AvBffdVeL8N4e1dF_PcvuNLJjjL9PAUdyyhfuzVrW_ViB0C5g6FY4JQClw8fZnxuz6qqJrHMcEi0uHu0)
_[**Click here to make a secure $5 donation. >>>**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=8824bf4225d9447c8390981bc3fda9a4&_e=Gx3dzC1v33rL1zHoyyvpF3kD4m-vrCVNaTox0JW778fZWsISbRejs4UMutNXBak12Tvpcrud4007H6HMXkZNKsL32HwFZwLGDBe7135vU8IOUiG1lDsFiwhEmxTaEQipE8jK7A6VrMEse55A6KNL3IuTRJ4IkfRbWhUtLe82RE2JA046Xwg_tG2EczYVRxmQgIRCIbFy8g0AvdQ6g6SEWtC0gznzOwUqPhRNzKSRjldULU8KiX8bHSrMoys49UG3pWBEXldCgSmEmI3c5xPSATDaEIiP2RkLO21kVl3f9BAHSzf6HuXht9vJy05w3OezcZsWYwWY3cQOcBv7QKCegTMdlf0qBFqGynZjKXOUmrXGJJG5N4yQL-ri6vwG3rVVtsAH4mkw4SyU-YJ3xV5uKijfdd5RVizwfSptoUo5-8uurKOFMTSPiteJrbdUHFEwzPQXNK7XNR5vqcg2Z8w-H0I-g5ncC60AqiYMEPUVTEs45LT0SNTAXD2Xr93CkV9w)_

Let’s make this our best month yet!

Thank you,
Jamie

body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=63773cfd0a3840858bcd51e8e1fb41e4&_e=TUR8ZopjT-ZCQQdLUNIvUoOLnchkgKkPS1TA68Yjsv7knOm6h85iKvKAgF6wHtAdWc9qciok6Nl4noOoKgEKBrzb6_LBRgEXPfZXNhwpxwbBONp6c6OISSjgGsAPM6UWFQNYI4lLndC8vNs9ginbN59lqDNeeb5VMjpyd4hxcP_XGupUHa1oGz_XzK5K-5jO0BrMZri7LFdha4bP0gDD4cF0upnvuGoyTM6_nA2FjqzJjTlPOt29_sRneIdU5aWIZS9YW-yfqwYXb-9GAHS_LOeTnYWQRV4RK4LsZtuO9QO8u5pvBON_EV52SjRX6GKiOYyFuO63MlejVpqF7qcNFVv_oag3f7ftYqhE_Nb-trT7j6RdknQqMieRE37rTLSxDzQohuxRPCTpqQ9ajyKzZyAzR8-U75SkP2YofawAQ8XsbNKcgQw8tnmPStJuzwx67giiGHPbbymtWMfJoKyYVhmBg3Mogmkx1Ieo9TQG5aTgxma4WE7AKtnURe15RvhheC4ZzMa8u-0YP0I9CC7Flw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=63773cfd0a3840858bcd51e8e1fb41e4&_e=TUR8ZopjT-ZCQQdLUNIvUoOLnchkgKkPS1TA68Yjsv7knOm6h85iKvKAgF6wHtAdWc9qciok6Nl4noOoKgEKBrzb6_LBRgEXPfZXNhwpxwbBONp6c6OISSjgGsAPM6UWFQNYI4lLndC8vNs9ginbN59lqDNeeb5VMjpyd4hxcP_XGupUHa1oGz_XzK5K-5jO0BrMZri7LFdha4bP0gDD4cF0upnvuGoyTM6_nA2FjqzJjTlPOt29_sRneIdU5aWIZS9YW-yfqwYXb-9GAHS_LOeTnYWQRV4RK4LsZtuO9QO8u5pvBON_EV52SjRX6GKihanM9IV7D0myOtxefavbjdH2CNFOSLpmyZQJT_tlZJnhuQifwcEmzkaSxdQWnIRxbZFyzUOkEuXkQ5I47ErkfCdEkvQVgIwvig_bhBwdyuu6P_xChHA9HR6-vyus0ZDSPaTJDjF1FxaxnOBeKk7ib7lRly67pKIQIOKT7THeNamtz816SogSmaQGxozlCQtxCgcX7_sYfcBiihyzzlENsA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=63773cfd0a3840858bcd51e8e1fb41e4&_e=TUR8ZopjT-ZCQQdLUNIvUoOLnchkgKkPS1TA68Yjsv7knOm6h85iKvKAgF6wHtAdWc9qciok6Nl4noOoKgEKBrzb6_LBRgEXPfZXNhwpxwbBONp6c6OISSjgGsAPM6UWFQNYI4lLndC8vNs9ginbN59lqDNeeb5VMjpyd4hxcP_XGupUHa1oGz_XzK5K-5jO0BrMZri7LFdha4bP0gDD4cF0upnvuGoyTM6_nA2FjqzJjTlPOt29_sRneIdU5aWIZS9YW-yfqwYXb-9GAHS_LOeTnYWQRV4RK4LsZtuO9QO8u5pvBON_EV52SjRX6GKiE94EYi215v9o40-ZZTFvgjINdspj4P0Bxqy_u7m3TLRY56qq9TEWCTWZz71_D4XXJll-VHpZtD-t6WhF_8sJqvAKPtt_CMefjwpBSqF0j98jAmVtgzzmc80Gbmt7e5gOILH0srzbv5TBxw3gjLOILJkg0FC9SqdpU--LAdT9W8cNk4AskZIIpqJ05t5RuNpXx8EX9XgNVUi8LxyOTljGUA%3D%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.
