clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
Friends —

In a moment I’m going to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Tom O’Halleran. But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

Every contribution to our campaign helps us lay the groundwork for a victory in 2022. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._

**Last month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And just recently, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign.**

So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 40,000 contribution goal.

**My team tells me we are close to our goal, and if we can get there, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

[_**If you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our campaign and Tom O’Halleran? body:
Former Tucson Mayor Jonathan Rothschild has exciting news [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34815077/303155125/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE5ZTBjOC0yOTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXGGJgutyRl3SesuZkj7RcsEILpZkcXtdRedAD29op8=&emci=fc045fc8-5607-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6719e0c8-2908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=12898431)

Hello friend,
I’m proud to announce that I’ll officially be joining the team as Campaign Treasurer!
I’ve known Kirsten for years, and she has consistently impressed me with her intellect and her innate ability to lead. She has been a tremendous legislator and is proving to be a phenomenal congressional candidate. She has put together an outstanding team, and like all of you, I can’t wait to call her my Congresswoman.
However, we can’t get her elected without the support of grassroots supporters such as yourself.
We’re facing a critical deadline this month. I know, I know... you’ve heard that before. But let me tell you about fundraising in August in Arizona:**it is brutal.** This is the time of year when a lot of campaigns check out.
But that’s not how this team operates. We are tenacious, and this is the time in the election cycle that the true contenders separate themselves from the field. We have an ambitious goal for August, and we need your help. [**Can Kirsten count on you to rush a $50 contribution to help us reach this critical end of month goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34815078/303155126/41694283?refcode=X_082821_EOM_A&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE5ZTBjOC0yOTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXGGJgutyRl3SesuZkj7RcsEILpZkcXtdRedAD29op8=)

name: Erica Smith
subject: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Will you help me beat the odds?
#
It’s 2021, and not a single Black woman serves in the United States Senate. NONE!!
**Here’s a big reason why: According to the Center for Responsive Politics, on average, Black women candidates raise HALF of what white candidates raise.**
[**A donation from you today will help change that. Can you donate $5 to our historic campaign for U.S. Senate today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12982?refcode=em20210828-387&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=387%2E3698%2E_8DEA9) It’s going to take a lot of resources to win but, if elected, I would be the FIRST Black woman in history to represent North Carolina in the Senate.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12982?refcode=em20210828-387&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=387%2E3698%2E_8DEA9)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12982?refcode=em20210828-387&%3Bamp%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=387%2E3698%2E_8DEA9)
As a Black woman raised in rural North Carolina, I’ve witnessed first-hand all the ways our system fails us. That’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for working people as a teacher, a minister, and a state senator — and it’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate.
But the reality is that Black women face incredible obstacles when running for political office. We’re often _overlooked and outraised_ because the pundits and the party establishment count us out.
[**Will you help me beat the odds? Chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us build a massive, unapologetic movement for working people that will challenge the status quo and win this race for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12982?refcode=em20210828-387&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=387%2E3698%2E_8DEA9)
Let’s do this!
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

clean_body: Will you help me beat the odds? It’s 2021, and not a single Black woman serves in the United States Senate. NONE!! Here’s a big reason why: According to the Center for Responsive Politics, on average, Black women candidates raise HALF of what white candidates raise. It’s going to take a lot of resources to win but, if elected, I would be the FIRST Black woman in history to represent North Carolina in the Senate. As a Black woman raised in rural North Carolina, I’ve witnessed first-hand all the ways our system fails us. That’s why I’ve spent my life fighting for working people as a teacher, a minister, and a state senator — and it’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=849aebc44eca4087a89f63119c2ec34d&_e=hrmgG6mF82w6tX-og-Z-lt9E6lVk8IfUetTbS7LcVR9RnhFRYWkaHsIjyxzRzdnDOhvTM0HuudKFhGryBy1znjGrQhxiB4KxKwengWkXihFS8XR0hmoVpI5mqlzZtXmAuTH9teeYjcWllNTD-yoTERGMzkaj2-EEs3bFIBNkT3lPzCC6FKK41wDVLYpmgLRV_JgD1vomjysS8IpMc-ICOG5Ih_kQAmkdGsQokuUPIfoaxXsm-Em-yTxOXc_NVoPbfeT2O8UvL2k3YmPG5ZFXsYRagdMLkaXUboVWxmbw1hrpQzMUCSM9NAprRikUY9VFuux0EScss-psAHXfsaa3fuRScT6Mq6qMFZocEgMgTytiSeVY6L8cbIBpS0UilI6wVyNo4rqKcGTHPnQ6qlvdIu5mPQeAOXAkAKscnkmnerEQDNZBNjUxvcz3XnH5U79g4Gypp5F3jTXuiHxbyhINcnwJaJ3YgOJYebRB2JHeW54y8En40-JL9voo811EtWgz)

Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=849aebc44eca4087a89f63119c2ec34d&_e=hrmgG6mF82w6tX-og-Z-lt9E6lVk8IfUetTbS7LcVR9RnhFRYWkaHsIjyxzRzdnDOhvTM0HuudKFhGryBy1znjGrQhxiB4KxKwengWkXihFS8XR0hmoVpI5mqlzZtXmAuTH9teeYjcWllNTD-yoTERGMzkaj2-EEs3bFIBNkT3lPzCC6FKK41wDVLYpmgLRV_JgD1vomjysS8IpMc-ICOG5Ih_kQAmkdGsQokuUPIfoaxXsm-Em-yTxOXc_NVoPbfeT2O8UvL2k3YmPG5ZFXsYRagdMLkaXUboVWxmbw1hp2ZgejzBb-6M12ukh-WL-oBY9ArSVcOYD64ohMGuINDt7v4TO6e2MnMO0tuCTpVkoXvkWC-5etf3ANfXHlOROxN-8jnYw_onHDOb-W5GkvmDMAEeZ7yBm3gccD8PbNfSXvxLnAy1Efqi1Q0J23ro2RDRUU1JJOS8fBOX9ZgOhZQ6aqfvPFIdDmVdq9nnMpDaRyy7cj931OEznOAdmD1y-s)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=849aebc44eca4087a89f63119c2ec34d&_e=hrmgG6mF82w6tX-og-Z-lt9E6lVk8IfUetTbS7LcVR9RnhFRYWkaHsIjyxzRzdnDOhvTM0HuudKFhGryBy1znjGrQhxiB4KxKwengWkXihFS8XR0hmoVpI5mqlzZtXmAuTH9teeYjcWllNTD-yoTERGMzkaj2-EEs3bFIBNkT3lPzCC6FKK41wDVLYpmgLRV_JgD1vomjysS8IpMc-ICOG5Ih_kQAmkdGsQokuUPIfoaxXsm-Em-yTxOXc_NVoPbfeT2O8UvL2k3YmPG5ZFXsYRagdMLkaXUboVWxmbw1hp2NViCNapYzDSaamYOUzM767k5RFSvrtXeKdm29SY2JPdOy1QIEolmlNT7M5H46UpXbA3Nr1V0BDNHerQ7wMc6BnOJBCUDXmqIFhNYQg_k86yP9OJIUvDt_h2axYGJE0FMnSLAAtH7Sk9d2LC7Lhj85N_kWTQq4ZEjgdszoNf6uMWEojU0XaCaznJYW5MC8WhiOYbLcRKa2w0hy71IR7ts)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=849aebc44eca4087a89f63119c2ec34d&_e=hrmgG6mF82w6tX-og-Z-lt9E6lVk8IfUetTbS7LcVR9RnhFRYWkaHsIjyxzRzdnDOhvTM0HuudKFhGryBy1znjGrQhxiB4KxKwengWkXihFS8XR0hmoVpI5mqlzZtXmAuTH9teeYjcWllNTD-yoTERGMzkaj2-EEs3bFIBNkT3lPzCC6FKK41wDVLYpmgLRV_JgD1vomjysS8IpMc-ICOG5Ih_kQAmkdGsQokuUPIfoaxXsm-Em-yTxOXc_NVoPbfeT2O8UvL2k3YmPG5ZFXsYRagdMLkaXUboVWxmbw1hpn5W1TOwSnB1xz32NJ9pJ8ar00x3TPC2lqu8ks7o7MiPNjvPWEGwWloKkjJtjwSrAwSYY7Jq1Ycc9Wy_OFr4wn0E82iVXRRidxEW4OdvSMFpvThqtmpjM8TKfzedk4n948Tf5goy0WT9E3oRVcUzSOL1v10o4ahO7RwLrWrpSsEGLcZkQAumDWU4ZBXPYXD4RDnypY812sz-g7vzIZAZ-K) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=849aebc44eca4087a89f63119c2ec34d&_e=hrmgG6mF82w6tX-og-Z-lt9E6lVk8IfUetTbS7LcVR9RnhFRYWkaHsIjyxzRzdnDOhvTM0HuudKFhGryBy1znjGrQhxiB4KxKwengWkXihFS8XR0hmoVpI5mqlzZtXmAuTH9teeYjcWllNTD-yoTERGMzkaj2-EEs3bFIBNkT3lPzCC6FKK41wDVLYpmgLRV_JgD1vomjysS8IpMc-ICOG5Ih_kQAmkdGsQokuUPIfoaxXsm-Em-yTxOXc_NVoPbfeT2O8UvL2k3YmPG5ZFXsYRagdMLkaXUboVWxmbw1hpAws51jIVK9rXD8ekxLuq1mUK9Vd65VRAQINNN10nLvTIs8mzPNdi1ZLuv-1h-dMZB3VbWWHhoq-TmXuTzMu1nM4DxF1FnP9fdHHQZXMmUqfV94UtDMJFSy6Gi1JMStFaZdvrtCqIV3LdFhu7Ht_JbQqsExb5yuPmm4Z8Qkgi2NrfFQ-cqpWMhxCc3nkBqpFXZwOI5m70Mj5ZHEoWUUipw)

body:
How are we letting this guy win?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34815804/303157045/-2023814932?refcode=20210828.4_TM_8EF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE5ZTBjOC0yOTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYzh6bVexcTtj-vCRM6yHCrPjEa16ybfgvZdxMydlGI=)

| | Derek, I’m not exaggerating when I say this is the most competitive race in the country in 2021. **Recent polling has this race dangerously close, with some polls even showing a virtual TIE — and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year.**

My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office, he’s spent millions on ad blitzes, and the RNC is pouring millions into his field program.

Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-women, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump THREE times.

So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. _**I told you that we’ve got the biggest filing deadline of the campaign coming up in just THREE DAYS, and as of right now, we’re blowing it.**_

**_[We’re in the middle of a huge moment, and we can’t afford to just let Glenn Youngkin beat us. clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Derek, I’m not exaggerating when I say this is the most competitive race in the country in 2021. Recent polling has this race dangerously close, with some polls even showing a virtual TIE — and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office, he’s spent millions on ad blitzes, and the RNC is pouring millions into his field program. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-women, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump THREE times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. I told you that we’ve got the biggest filing deadline of the campaign coming up in just THREE DAYS, and as of right now, we’re blowing it. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy. \-- Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Bees are dying, and it’s on us to protect them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Big corporations are killing the bees with their chemical sprays. Between 2016 and 2018, the United States lost an estimated one-third of its honeybee colonies. Pollinators hold our entire food system together, and these disturbing trends pose an inescapable and egregious threat to our food supply chain and the environment. Our pollinators are in crisis \-- if we don't act now, our ecosystems will be in critical danger of collapse. That's why we're reaching out to you today: We need you to become a citizen co-sponsor of The Saving America's Pollinators Act and demand that companies cease the use of environmentally harmful pesticides that kill bees, butterflies, hummingbirds, and other pollinators. Congress will continue to ignore this crisis if we don't hit our goal of 2,500 citizen co-sponsors before midnight tonight. | **[SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34816869/303160478/-998656919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlYTdhM2ZhLTJkMDgtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N5gsyqYPp-dzydRJLX7ynfKo-N3izbd1EN_OxBGM0eQ=&emci=34a9d98a-5d07-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8ea7a3fa-2d08-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=5546903)**

25th Amendment? | Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.

Peter,

Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.

Biden blames everyone else but himself - including my father who did nothing wrong. I'd say it's **unbelievable ...** _but it 's actually not at all unbelievable, unfortunately._

If the first 7 months have been THIS BAD, imagine what Biden can do with the remaining 3.5 years of his presidency. **It 's time for Joe Biden to resign. If this disaster occured under my father, every Democrat and fake news reporter in the country would be calling for the 25th Amendment.

Maybe it should be used on Joe?

One thing is for certain though, he is not fit to be OUR President, and something must be done. **

_You can INCREASE your impact by 300% when you step up NOW._

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign IMMEDIATELY and your gift will be increased by 300%.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208540:JNEPcN2dN:m:1:3253819041:113F252489C440AD2EE08BF9139678C8:r)**

Joe Biden didn't take any questions at his press conference because he's not capable of it. If you watched him struggle through the speech, you could see it in his eyes: there's nothing behind them, no one is home, and it's likely that he took days off just to be able to muster the energy to get through that BS.

I'm going to call my father with the list of patriots who called for Biden's resignation - can I tell him you stepped up?

clean_body: | | As we close out August, we wanted to remind you of why Tom Nelson is the right choice for Senator: If you already know Tom is the right choice, then= | Tom is in the middle of The Full Nelson Tour, visiting all 72 counties in Wisconsin in 72 days. How many other candidates in this crowded primary are doing that? Tom is the only elected progressive candidate in this race who comes from a Trump county — a red county he’s won multiple times. Tom will deliver real, progressive leadership in Congress. Tom would never block legislation aimed at helping working people. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for stepping up, Nelson HQ | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)

I don't mean to alarm you, but our Majority is in deep trouble.

**1** \-- Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back power.
**2** \-- They've broken **FIVE** monthly fundraising records in a row.
**3** \-- And they now have **$7 MILLION** more in the bank than my House Democrats.

This isn't my first rodeo, so believe me when I say: **That kind of advantage could spell defeat for our House Majority if we don 't respond in a BIG way.**

That's why I had no choice but to set an ambitious $300,000 End of Month goal -- and with the stakes this high, failure is just simply not an option.

**So I 'm counting on my very best grassroots supporters like you to help me crush my goal before time runs out in just 72 hours. **

Can you rush in $3 to defend our House Majority straight away?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: State Income Tax Abolition – Update from Mississippi’s Leading Liberty Campaign
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/stateincometaxabolition?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=801c9e6bc5&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=508e1be447&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=083003f69f&e=5703353baa)
---
| Dear Friend,
Grover Norquist of Americans for Tax Reform was in Mississippi this week in support of our efforts to abolish the state income tax.

Grover met many political leaders and gave evidence to the legislative committee looking into the question of income tax abolition.

---
|
---
| Abolishing state income tax would mean:
* **Workers get to keep more of what they earn each month.** Instead of handing over $1 out of every $20 they make in their pay packet to the state of Mississippi, they would get to decide how to spend that money on their priorities and families.
* **A boost for Mississippi’s competitiveness**. Having a state income tax makes Mississippi a less attractive place to do business, which is why so many young Mississippians move to states like Tennessee, Texas and Florida, states with low or no state income tax.

There are, however, competing ideas about the best way to axe the income tax. Some are proposing to abolish income tax by increasing other taxes. Others have suggested that we phase out income tax using some of the $1 billion surplus in the state budget. The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is working to ensure that we find agreement so that the income tax is eliminated, and taxes go down, not up. It was great to have Grover, one of the key architects of successful tax reduction programs, come to Mississippi to encourage and support our efforts.
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=07a6f6aafb&e=5703353baa)
---
| Mississippi has experienced an overall population decrease over the last ten years. An income tax repeal could help turn that around and bring growth back to our great state.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6ea65c03be&e=5703353baa)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Corporate interests in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
House Democrats are writing this bill right now, and I’m fighting for every single one of our priorities.
#
Peter, let me tell you a few things about the transformative $3.5 trillion spending bill in Congress.
**First, a very small group of Democrats have tried to block the bill.** They call themselves “moderates.” The truth is, it’s not the moderate position to be against investments in child care, paid leave, health care, and addressing climate change. This is the Democratic agenda, it is the president's agenda, and it is what we promised people across America.
**Second, this could be the most significant piece of progressive legislation passed in decades.** We have the chance to expand Medicare, guarantee paid leave for working people, make investments in education and child care, fight climate change, and so much more. That’s what we’re fighting for in this bill.
**[Can you chip in $3 to fuel my progressive fight? My team let me know that we’re working hard to bring in $50,000 before the end of August. I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs or Wall Street, because my fight is for the people, not corporate profits.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5416?refcode=em20210828-580&t=20&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)**
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5416?refcode=em20210828-580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)**
This bill is being written right now, and I’m fighting for every single one of our priorities — because folks desperately need economic relief and real action to avert further climate disaster. My Democratic colleagues and I will also be fighting to ensure “moderates” don’t get in the way of passing the investments we need.
This fight isn’t going away anytime soon. I’m used to long fights — but we organize to secure victories for working people in the end. This time will be no different.
**[Peter, can you chip in to fuel my fight for bold, transformative change across this country? Economic relief, social change, and the fight for the environment is only possible with all of us working together.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5416?refcode=em20210828-580&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210828-580-footer&t=23&refcode2=580_420207_Mt4cTY&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=580%2E420207%2EMt4cTY)

Fellow Patriot, This week, the "January 6th Select Committee" (Nancy Pelosi's pet project) released a list of demands including Trump White House communications with a number of conservative activists. Bianca Gracia's name was on it! It's not every day the radical lefties in Congress release a hit list, but I am privileged to be on it. Nancy Pelosi's sham investigators may try to rattle our cage, but the courageous men and women on that list won't stop their fight against globalists who hate America. As their fake narrative about an "armed, murderous insurrection" falls apart, Big Government and their Narrative Machine are getting more bold than ever in their quest to silence us. We must say NO! They must not be allowed to steamroll conservative voices with persecution by prosecution. It's time for every American, no matter their political persuasion, to fight this blatant grab for power. Congress and the White House as using the full weight of federal power to punish their political opponents.

I spoke too soon ...
| | |

We only have three days to reach this fundraising goal, and since yesterday, things are really starting to slow down.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206933:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58206932:J1kYPN2Nl:m:1:3253819041:9BAAAB2039D8100B1EF96DA620683114:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})

**Here's the catch: Central Valley voters _know_ that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know Marisa is the viable Democrat running against him.**

That's why we're spreading the word about the alternative we're offering, and we're doing it now.

**We are coming up $32,131 short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:**

McCarthy repulses voters. The Biden budget that he's so eager to block is the same one that expands the child tax credit and access to healthcare.

McCarthy would rather take a queue from the most extreme members of his caucus than be bothered to do something to help his own district.

But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and their solutions. That's exactly what we're doing, and it’s why we need your help.

clean_body: McCarthy said that the Biden budget will only pass "over his dead body" | = We'll be direct, friend. = | = Here's the latest in Kevin McCarthy's quest to get the Speaker's gavel: = Classic Kevin McCarthy. All talk, no action. If that's how he'll try to run his campaign here in CA-23, he's got another thing coming. Here's the catch: Central Valley voters know that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know Marisa is the viable Democrat running against him. That's why we're spreading the word about the alternative we're offering, and we're doing it now. We are coming up $32,131 short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team: = McCarthy repulses voters. The Biden budget that he's so eager to block is the same one that expands the child tax credit and access to healthcare. McCarthy would rather take a queue from the most extreme members of his caucus than be bothered to do something to help his own district. But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and their solutions. body:
Today, we’re thrilled to recap this week’s slate of endorsements for Derek Schmidt! Check out all of these new Kansas House Representatives who..... Friend, Today, we’re thrilled to recap this week’s slate of endorsements for Derek Schmidt! Check out all of these new members Kansas House Representatives who are supporting our campaign:
* Rep Ron Ellis
* Rep. Lance Neelly
* Rep. David French
* Rep. Ken Collins
* Rep. Joe Newland

subject: A message from Captain Mark Kelly of Arizona

body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zlfBS2PZz9u1yxKa56wYuUeHaTLOcONC&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend --
We're coming up on our August fundraising deadline, and I'm going to ask for your support, but first I hope you'll give me the time to explain why it's so important.
**Last month, another Republican announced his candidacy for 2022, this time with a $10 million super PAC at his back. That means we now have FOUR opponents running to defeat me and take back this Senate seat.**
With this much competition, we can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goals even once.
My team tells me we need 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to stay on track.
**[If you can, will you split a $5 contribution between Sen. Blumenthal and my people-powered campaign to help us defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rb4mk?refcode=jtk1065-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

Our people-powered campaign stunned National Republicans in 2020 by defying the odds and winning. I know we can do it again, because I can count on grassroots supporters like you to have my back.
I can't thank you enough for your support. It means the world to me to have so many of you with me in the fight for our shared values.
Full speed ahead!
-- Mark

clean_body: Friend -- We're coming up on our August fundraising deadline, and I'm going to ask for your support, but first I hope you'll give me the time to explain why it's so important. Last month, another Republican announced his candidacy for 2022, this time with a $10 million super PAC at his back. That means we now have FOUR opponents running to defeat me and take back this Senate seat. With this much competition, we can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goals even once. My team tells me we need 20,000 contributions before the end of the month to stay on track. | | | | | | | | | Our people-powered campaign stunned National Republicans in 2020 by defying the odds and winning. I know we can do it again, because I can count on grassroots supporters like you to have my back. I can't thank you enough for your support. It means the world to me to have so many of you with me in the fight for our shared values. Full speed ahead! -- Mark

I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40b375953cae487eadea8bbacbac70b0&_e=bFrU0EyTDWrsKcUgz59MzumZbh6K2uXr6zLuWlXKqI7ItCNluJamPD19V6ASMv4EZLEPTlJ5ZKEHbPxZY7wffUsRIrYXTWLuuUDs1A4p05qM4xTWWSmVXHcVXtOwBa8XuZi3grk94kM8gZR_IAa0_atKnQIepZvAQDjcQh0xOcGEaV3aE2a2Wp2TfcLJzwBOS0twopx1v-aC4C0BpYeR4U_3qH-qiKwZFQDg9uaRKvzCFQzGSQKCoaQWyfUdtVoPxue2TzLgHkQM8pUGxb6Brkw_KKrQcWbnYdgYnwUYVwPilxSWsKGPdDi6gjZ8VeAFRcBahD-1PdtATlKp-EOZX6SkNswLKQf1wEG4IxUamIkB7MRZa7Cwu2TG4qdjejq6QhyUtE3rw4xHnoWDttW_g5zJrYyv5BqLJ5t-Tc2rTeVYq8bSOJNvENLA9vTk1wEiujMI9uZUvNw_qpUh9EriMhGGAMkyPLYfLiupetjaVPK11LGjrlTfTtozX9QQNHAJD35tvKJ4uhAiPuuwWCluvQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40b375953cae487eadea8bbacbac70b0&_e=bFrU0EyTDWrsKcUgz59MzumZbh6K2uXr6zLuWlXKqI7ItCNluJamPD19V6ASMv4EZLEPTlJ5ZKEHbPxZY7wffUsRIrYXTWLuuUDs1A4p05qM4xTWWSmVXHcVXtOwBa8XuZi3grk94kM8gZR_IAa0_atKnQIepZvAQDjcQh0xOcGEaV3aE2a2Wp2TfcLJzwBOS0twopx1v-aC4C0BpYeR4U_3qH-qiKwZFQDg9uaRKvzCFQzGSQKCoaQWyfUdtVoPxue2TzLgHkQM8pUGxb6Brkw_KKrQcWbnYdgYnwUYVwPilxSWsKGPdDi6gjZ8VeAFNA7zhGS6XH-R5wvb237URIatsbYR3xCxSGyxf6P9ea3UWDsG0mxToGdnNTpmRSUVU9bW7kddoLMZQ-u-sfXkTDZlGR3uaUV8upmpdFFwgaPA8N01uKnifHSaWPyp2JzN2Nzrf0NtR-Gmh6GkxQDWTQ380tWrV3EnDVzK_o_0SQt8qtS9M84BUTHhpNgW-9hm8bgKOfm0s2iglTFggucXaA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40b375953cae487eadea8bbacbac70b0&_e=bFrU0EyTDWrsKcUgz59MzumZbh6K2uXr6zLuWlXKqI7ItCNluJamPD19V6ASMv4EZLEPTlJ5ZKEHbPxZY7wffUsRIrYXTWLuuUDs1A4p05qM4xTWWSmVXHcVXtOwBa8XuZi3grk94kM8gZR_IAa0_atKnQIepZvAQDjcQh0xOcGEaV3aE2a2Wp2TfcLJzwBOS0twopx1v-aC4C0BpYeR4U_3qH-qiKwZFQDg9uaRKvzCFQzGSQKCoaQWyfUdtVoPxue2TzLgHkQM8pUGxb6Brkw_KKrQcWbnYdgYnwUYVwPilxSWsKGPdDi6gjZ8VeAFy-lwYgqnsnTAHA7qOIbmc44nFqoNuOSkgWw7B1HQhUsUCehevZq16uOPuoAFeCBhtaP5vSLNHrmDnKsoiCHNcWhw-Qa5XmMoP3LKcWf681XWIi6ZiQAfM3niizFMWw-0DSD2_a3gq_bu73AWlHJLeo0oGyQ3jvM-3PD6_CWGldVm9Hkc1eYoYANnq1hjpf6ORnMxYiiNSQIU0yIi66YiXA%3D%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=40b375953cae487eadea8bbacbac70b0&_e=bFrU0EyTDWrsKcUgz59MzumZbh6K2uXr6zLuWlXKqI7ItCNluJamPD19V6ASMv4EZLEPTlJ5ZKEHbPxZY7wffUsRIrYXTWLuuUDs1A4p05qM4xTWWSmVXHcVXtOwBa8XuZi3grk94kM8gZR_IAa0_atKnQIepZvAQDjcQh0xOcGEaV3aE2a2Wp2TfcLJzwBOS0twopx1v-aC4C0BpYeR4U_3qH-qiKwZFQDg9uaRKvzCFQzGSQKCoaQWyfUdtVoPxue2TzLgHkQM8pUGxb6Brkw_KKrQcWbnYdgYnwUYVwPilxSWsKGPdDi6gjZ8VeAFq02kVTTq2GmFgFnuhACPJVGiYzh2zIdpflnYSTYgcxVWIkMnvv6-engNc3DI2gR046VtLVZTw7DoMX0B4ZS7Xuw4ySSjxvYvZD9eFqkmPBxUlt5QV9Td0gtqsSp-ls4Du25xotNDWgmoMfdS4i_BspQwZTzPvFpz7Th2_Huqt25_V2sY7rPDPV1OempHIlPsavNJkU1MWQAXhX6jFtZ5FA%3D%3D) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Fellow Conservative, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory when he unexpectedly and inexplicably _removed our great soldiers from Afghanistan_ before taking out our U.S. citizens and allies.

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: McConnell’s revenge.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know:
#

Friend,
I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.
In a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to split a $3 donation to support my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to defend our hard-won Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-ccm-aug21?refcode=em210828-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1210_6688874_irIh6q&akid=1210%2E6688874%2EirIh6q) I hope you’ll let me explain – because if either of us lose our races, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.
I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**
CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and The Cook Political Report just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me.
**That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate.[Please, will you split $3 right now between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to defend our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-ccm-aug21?refcode=em210828-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1210_6688874_irIh6q&akid=1210%2E6688874%2EirIh6q)
Nevada races are _always_ close: Just 2 percentage points decided my race in 2016, and just 2 percentage points separated President Biden from Donald Trump last year.
Now that the GOP’s dark-money allies have a far-right, Trump-supporting extremist to throw their money behind and flip the only seat they need to regain Senate control, this race could be the most expensive in Nevada history.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But defending the Senate will take considerable resources – and right now I’m falling short of my emergency rapid-response goal. **Please, before it’s too late, will you rush a donation to help me win and defend the Senate majority?**
Here’s the best link to give: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-ccm-aug21**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-ccm-aug21?refcode=em210828-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1210_6688874_irIh6q&akid=1210%2E6688874%2EirIh6q)
Thank you so much for your support.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1210%2E6688874%2EirIh6q).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

This month, Ras has been all over the state, including the AFL-CIO convention in Altoona, the Iowa State Fair in Des Moines, and back in his home town of Waterloo for their back-to-school bash. Along the way, he’s meeting with labor leaders, educators, organizers, and working families to hear their concerns and work to find common solutions to all of our struggles.

It’s the end of August and kids are going back to school. Last weekend I donated supplies at the Back to School Fest in Hendersonville and we helped our son Calvin get ready to start a new year.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34825416/303177337/1588127313?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210828_FR_EOM2School_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWRmYWY4Ny00MTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-RkF7qR5r6CvUaoh7X75wWI4nKSY-x7We4eKGLrx9M=)
Seeing families all across Western North Carolina starting a new school year this past week reminded me of why I’m running for Congress.
I want a future where all of our kids can thrive -- whether it's pushing for universal Pre-K, making sure our schools are properly funded and teachers are paid a dignified wage for their hard work, or ensuring that every child is valued and respected no matter who they are or where they come from.
**My vision for North Carolina families differs vastly from Republican Congressman Madison Cawthorn’s.** Our campaign is built on hope, love and empathy. His is based on fear-mongering, extremist rhetoric, and spreading division.
Our children deserve to grow up in a community where their representatives put their education, safety, and well-being ahead of their own partisan agendas -- and that’s why I’m running for Congress.
[**Together, we can forge a new path forward. I’m relying on small dollar donations from supporters like you to make the big changes our kids deserve -- can I count on you to help me flip NC-11 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34825417/303177338/-217737161?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210828_FR_EOM2School_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWRmYWY4Ny00MTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-RkF7qR5r6CvUaoh7X75wWI4nKSY-x7We4eKGLrx9M=)

Hi Peter, it’s Veronica with a campaign update!

As Campaign Manager of Hala Ayala’s Democratic campaign for Lt. Governor, it’s part of my job to keep tabs on our upcoming deadlines.

body:

Peter,

Last night I was on Sean Hannity, **[and I wanted to make sure you saw the highlight reel!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)
As I discussed with Sean, I launched my Senate campaign in Georgia because **I believe in putting in hard work to achieve the American Dream. EVERYONE should have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.**

Unfortunately, our national leaders are too busy putting their self-interests first and playing politics to see the harm they are causing our country.

Americans are hurting and deserve a leader who will PUT THIS COUNTRY FIRST. I'm that leader, Peter, **[and it's why I'm asking for you to join my team today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)**

[** CHIP IN $10 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208092:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)
[** CHIP IN $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208093:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)

I have what it takes to stand up to D.C. politicians, WIN this race, and help WIN BACK the Senate majority. **[But I can't do it without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)**

I've played a lot of sports, and I know it takes a strong team to achieve a common goal. I know we have what it takes to win. With your help, we can BEAT our opponent this election.

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)
I appreciated Sean having me on his show because, Peter, even though I just announced my candidacy; this Senate race is already heating up.

Before I even announced my candidacy, my opponent launched ATTACKS against me. It's clear my opponent is terrified of my campaign.

We don't need to worry about outraising our opponent, but we do need to build the momentum necessary to WIN THIS RACE.

It takes a strong team, Peter. Please, join me today. Let's WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58208091:6LFF9N2Ns:m:1:3253819041:B163F0E5F53D89BA8B91BC013678FFF6:r)
Herschel Walker

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Ohio grit | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XuUtaJFaJ_Egc2nvCDR5YtFYMsgmSkA5RI5jjNMgoR_Qfvcb6YRVkvrplawxHLMAqvaRpDFgbFHuzRhtYGkNgl6DwH-q2jjoGmNJs1eaTKr9ioCMXHvRAn4OzOuhpIlGjif4eG69YSGmfnpnGwE86PTsftYzeE6GEuNdScNbs_tNDIbMFWqv9vASw7APMVxuGp5_RPrt2zbLw0Ujl4juJQCq4Cn-s-m0dcJ6qerf1uiGSq10tUpEzWp93uVWxWVy1PvaRY_c-PorQwoDrf4lwVo/3eu/TambpdXRQ92gh74G1jJcjQ/h0/Gay5gZhS1W0nben0qIJwJvARt4NE9TzqD9quqcFaPe4)
Derek,

In a minute, [**I’ll ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XuUtaJFaJ_Egc2nvCDR5YtGdLws9AR5RCiJDWVWMIy-Eink3aZimz68VW0m7p8WPwINDSzyKgfnFNZufE2vurj8SdezsXELmTbrRa2NVCIsTtLw1acxT5B6EZ1aq20mlDWwfh3ROGoDSrM3-jZ9K7DJND3QtTcrgNUcXkbhQ1e0nkMyrMnf2X_KWjpLMmgWAWWQ8FsiQ9s_HMxXCKfnStxNbt7cxbf4-VZCVAgd9xPoF5BCy03FydEpLHqdOmgjFJ8wrDjFON_obCMwvyhc1fho/3eu/TambpdXRQ92gh74G1jJcjQ/h1/i0QPirywM0SY-8eQq-Snjh_e8axINhSUPK7WV4DtzkU) But first, can you give me a moment to explain why your support is so important — especially today?

I’m not your typical politician. I was raised by a single mom who worked clerical jobs to make sure we had a roof over our heads and food on the table. I watched my family lose their livelihoods when steel mills closed and jobs got shipped overseas. I grew up with Saturday football games and Sunday family dinners.

**I can promise you this: I’ll never forget where I came from or who I’m fighting for.** The single parents who work two jobs just to make ends meet. The tireless Ohioans who shower at the end of a long day. And every single American who works hard and does their part but still can’t seem to get by.

Meanwhile, my GOP opponents are laser-focused on stockpiling campaign cash and lining up support from right-wing special interests. They’ll spend MILLIONS to make sure we lose this race, so their wealthy friends can continue to get ahead at the expense of everyday Americans.

**That’s why I’m depending on grassroots folks like you to power our campaign. I know we have what it takes to beat the odds and flip this critical Senate seat blue, but only if we put our Ohio grit to work and build a team strong enough to win.**

[**We need to raise another $9,000 by tomorrow to stay on track to expand our Democratic Senate Majority. Can I count on you to split a $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XuUtaJFaJ_Egc2nvCDR5YtHljuSpHoEm6mOnNYZgVLfim4typaSoirlf9q-iCMS6SRgSPnArCkdOUIEC2QQRK6GGbPhwv2dLYGtIeAwIEUZuImwb6SfpNA9YcZLE8L5JN8UBTYiUg48j5kM0fbfmQXYp8GWH1HmRhCx7zvamVskkGb8bxP8aHYBt0YD7YqZwdVj6R9oQLZxCMfoo2d6WKcqzPqcA03mudNNSWRxzKEaTO_KA1xL50XRuj4Vauf2HQY1dinu45ETcSlhS7FfyTIQ/3eu/TambpdXRQ92gh74G1jJcjQ/h2/9-docQBSXBijvj6tg8BJbI0Rth00ZXsr8O5ioHtSSDQ) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XuUtaJFaJ_Egc2nvCDR5YtFK0tYxsvTcOGoLedZkkeU0i_nLJNqjHqVG4onOytrq4zfmj6SWEj3dyianyS1S1uNJL4q928k12m7ufRFZ9NivpqPV6H2Y5trFFrVSCcRN61U35WYWSJk18GW65IVLgGHs_0mTQSHAPPYexYJS6Ll5fyztfFVJ4bz5-56j2RQA5Poe7gI8dGVoHvICgw7mq19pSThK-AQpum-beODBbcTaThDdh8rYJIAtqvuFDHDlFGeAT3DzaFZ0ivGA94J7UCU/3eu/TambpdXRQ92gh74G1jJcjQ/h3/7nTc3K0JydzgTB0tgNmBNmM9yuq04hzJ4PkXG_cRl0g)

Thank you for all you do,

Tim

name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: Praying For Our Troops
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
Dear Friends, We would like to take this moment to recognize the servicemen and women who bravely gave their lives this week amid the
|
---
| | |
---|---|---
Dear Friends, We would like to take this moment to recognize the service members who bravely gave their lives this week amid the crisis in Afghanistan. The ultimate sacrifice they gave to keep us safe will forever be remembered. Team Youngkin is praying for the families who lost a loved one this week and for those who are still in danger in Afghanistan. With the tragedy that our country is currently facing, it is important that we remain unified in our fight for Virginia. As the campaign picks up, we have been busy meeting with supporters all over the Commonwealth.
---
| | |
---|---|---
I am so grateful for the opportunity I had to serve the community at the Virginia Peninsula Foodbank on Tuesday. It's organizations like this that make Virginia great!
---
---
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
I was also blessed to be given a tour of the Proton Therapy Institute at Hampton University. They are doing great work everyday and continue to fight to find a cure for cancer!
---
---
| | |
---|---|---
Yesterday was a big day for our ticket! Jason Miyares and I were joined by former Governor George Allen, as we opened our [Lynchburg campaign office](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VVPl3k8lv82VW3PdQ5j3dXX3VW1-ywb14wPCM6N3JhCGm3lSc3V1-WJV7CgHb0W47XNcf1v2x3DN7Pgn46Sc5v2N40HSbxrhpzdW24-P2P8qjF-QW6xY86Y1DmHJrW2CTrds8Lj8lGW5_2Rw73Lg0gYW4SQK6K7-lNWZW7cTlnp1VRLPXW21HfyX5Kt-h3N13Tmfr18MyZW4F5Nz64JvgHnW6F1L4x88Mnf2W4sjy7y7wjzn1W1_n-ZX9fbvW5W8t7BlQ8PZ-cYW1yMtq884tj_YW2FvHDw3Tjc6wW45xtbY1nwNLNW9ffZgX7rDQ6HN3wYMv0SSZ6KW6W54lS5fhH3XW6wRkzz4cPfhpN7djgDZjKGRg3k9L1). The ultimate sacrifice they gave to keep us safe will forever be remembered. Team Youngkin is praying for the families who lost a loved one this week and for those who are still in danger in Afghanistan. With the tragedy that our country is currently facing, it is important that we remain unified in our fight for Virginia. As the campaign picks up, we have been busy meeting with supporters all over the Commonwealth. | | | ---|---|--- I am so grateful for the opportunity I had to serve the community at the Virginia Peninsula Foodbank on Tuesday. It's organizations like this that make Virginia great! | | | ---|---|--- I was also blessed to be given a tour of the Proton Therapy Institute at Hampton University. Peter, can you believe Joe Biden lately? Over the last month, and many months, it looks and sounds like America is being led by a shell of a president.

**Let’s recap Biden’s August...**
* **Vacation at Camp David**
* **An embarrassing “Presidency-defining” interview with ABC**
* **MORE****Vacation at Camp David**
* **A long weekend in Delaware right after**

**THIS is the itinerary of the LEADER OF THE FREE WORLD during numerous crises?**

We think this is unacceptable for our commander-in-chief... and so does America. **Biden just recently polled at his lowest approval rating since being inaugurated President back in January.**

It’s a well-deserved vote of low confidence from the American people.

Truth is, America’s strong disapproval of Biden has been long in the making. From COVID-19 lockdowns strangling our businesses to the empty ‘stimulus’ keeping workers away, it’s become clear that **our leaders and president aren’t concerned about our communities.**

But Andrew is.

[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=0ce21ccdf9084b47a8be3c0f2ea9348e&_e=EjPtn9QoAb3rK85NSkq1nCYo8p0oQmKo2bKrJIH9EP-PM1oqFfWi-9rc56Qc37X_o_SqiYZSQn_V9ejlt0GLB91ynFdr8HpPTdiXxNXhmzMDr9Ych9Q0P-ZuzkgTp1YgS_N_wk2yHIShFPjeg7g3AqJ5-l0jsR_pazM4xMY9Q0OU8WrQUnNQycW69veJKC6FyqHzF2CIiIiN1D9NbFIE2CsdiiFLylA1A1QPZTZP2gXwQMrbl1hb0dfNpkkt9HqnVbaobCOOL5pYeb48qbhWVMQ8r0IzyngxtcNXWXrwpRcP-5wJ6173GT06n6IvsX5wWdBJ6evwNl5_MRPmkEncNTgGegIDIwTKf_Nzow02yGGWi6ZUvhXeZU-Ll0Ahb90AjWCfl57oF2mfbItHH21ECZf8SR_n7vTyNd6U4wmTaZgTCBQCT5SlP9cRdnLICvTHCd2RCyRzXDAdnudBuSdflxu41qwawqBvpSd3th-gVlY%3D) | |

Friend ー have you seen the news on this?

⬇⬇⬇

[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=0ce21ccdf9084b47a8be3c0f2ea9348e&_e=EjPtn9QoAb3rK85NSkq1nCYo8p0oQmKo2bKrJIH9EP-PM1oqFfWi-9rc56Qc37X_o_SqiYZSQn_V9ejlt0GLB91ynFdr8HpPTdiXxNXhmzMDr9Ych9Q0P-ZuzkgTp1YgS_N_wk2yHIShFPjeg7g3AqJ5-l0jsR_pazM4xMY9Q0OU8WrQUnNQycW69veJKC6FyqHzF2CIiIiN1D9NbFIE2CsdiiFLylA1A1QPZTZP2gXwQMrbl1hb0dfNpkkt9HqnVbaobCOOL5pYeb48qbhWVIaZ3hXtJ88Hc-URP0-ae8z5b-66KunAFdobHEKudIm8ricRp-7-bIPOqqsyCAWJeEDLYTOG7vyBbuUTY__cdt7jAxPRkWVza_t4nJdofoSwj-UOu1ZArIm29AVAzl_MnrMJKhYX_Ioz_jNrXWtpvQKJ0FWyrTZ1jp4YLOYxv4GqyKEik5v0ckgzHWqqNpXzFZVxZ5vmqK9UqZi6byRLs4E%3D)

Based on all available science, we know now that children are at extremely minimal risk to COVID-19, and teachers can be protected by vaccination.

So why on Earth are we still masking our children?

**We are stunting the education and development of our children because Democrats want to continue to use our children as political pawns! **

That’s why parents around the country are making their voices heard against this decision to force our children to wear masks in schools again.

**The time to fight back against**** _endless restrictions_**** _,_ **_**mask mandates**_**, and****_lockdowns_ ****is NOW!**

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: Did you receive a ballot?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 20 DAYS away. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c304%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=HFpYLHbQ%2fvcR4NcUSEOfjg&sysid=1)
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65205%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ddT05PRThNBYy5%2bRpCKSg&sysid=1)

---
**URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 20 DAYS away.**

[**Friend, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65206%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g2NyCPpYogrT%2f9CEYHkybg&sysid=1)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65207%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X6g2xe6iXIiFejhK97m%2bdA&sysid=1)
The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It’s imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can’t do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

[**Help us show Gavin that this recall isn’t a partisan effort, this is from Californians of all backgrounds . . . we’re tired of his failed attempt at leadership, are you?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1kjhAma9PxY1YdwItZe9Q&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

name: STACEY ABRAMS ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: Voting rights SAVED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Our House Democrats may have just secured a major voting rights victory, but the fight to protect voting rights is far from over. That's why Stacey Abrams has called on grassroots Democrats EVERYWHERE to band together and help save our voting rights and our House Majority from Trump's Republicans. Can we count on you to answer her call straight away with a $3 gift to elect House Democrats before our End of Month Deadline? This is so important, we're opening the TRIPLE MATCH for the first time this quarter!](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfw8~)**

There's not a moment to spare.

**FIRST:**

Our House Democrats defended voting rights in the face of relentless Republican attacks on our democracy.

**THEN:**

Stacey Abrams reminded us that there's still so much work left to be done -- and that we can't afford to take our foot off the gas for even a moment.

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**NOW:**

**[We're calling on 14,500 grassroots Democrats to answer Stacey's call and join her in the fight to defend our voting rights and our House Democrats from RUTHLESS Republican attacks. Can you chip in a TRIPLE-MATCHED $3 before our 72-hour End of Month Deadline to elect House Democrats nationwide?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)**
| [TRIPLE MATCH STATUS: ACTIVE
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
---

Stacey is absolutely right: **We MUST keep up the fight at this crucial moment.**

Republicans are counting on grassroots Democrats like you to pack up and go home.

So it's on us to send them a message that we're not going ANYWHERE -- _and that our House Majority is here to stay._

**[Can we count on you to chip in a Triple-Matched $3 before our End of Month Deadline to DEFEND our House Majority, ANSWER Stacey's call, and DEFEAT anti-democratic House Republicans all across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)**

**72-HOUR DEADLINE: TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVATED**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Herschel Walker
subject: watch before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6072aaa78bef4f30b276ad3439717928&_e=C8Dj-LV5Uyd4PZF1edWwDa2eTV1WCBLh9ZrMIhq102r-7ckjBS7hKROVmL-k0Sj8Wf3XqqkuQ88XJQ25wq2Geid70w0RQYU6NFuAheIwBUyTlU8lp5kV6re0i6xp1GIVKl2ng_7dEnhDbU4mKuokYgyXhsVrv1ocglyVEo4ITx9OQrblrt44MJ1YIwjEnWKK7accw0V2V1fra_qtx-5nACj4YpgySPixwia9WXKpjgSfmXouHLMyTxWw4-4DZjURq240oWNslfivZ_D2IlU_M3A-2weylGyEwmyUj9GbpcD0EUeMu1umMmxwNwe6e8YC4SI48XwnvxkPoNrAUauuBeYbdSQfpp1bwAqUe9-K-UoCYzQvmza3eCzUZ2hrJkaLoNrXGfkO08w0q3h825ZlMlPe1EAFsamsTywyviMr71sq20Yj2tIPkByuKjVPiOcva4bHj_SrigpNe2eHAsnp4RloEIjZ4bJmjkz2hptql1yqbPYTEAuDfgj3-wcwodM0)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6072aaa78bef4f30b276ad3439717928&_e=C8Dj-LV5Uyd4PZF1edWwDa2eTV1WCBLh9ZrMIhq102r-7ckjBS7hKROVmL-k0Sj8Wf3XqqkuQ88XJQ25wq2Geid70w0RQYU6NFuAheIwBUyTlU8lp5kV6re0i6xp1GIVKl2ng_7dEnhDbU4mKuokYgyXhsVrv1ocglyVEo4ITx9OQrblrt44MJ1YIwjEnWKK7accw0V2V1fra_qtx-5nACj4YpgySPixwia9WXKpjgSfmXouHLMyTxWw4-4DZjURq240oWNslfivZ_D2IlU_M3A-2weylGyEwmyUj9GbpcBberhqEMSdSArNis_X1IbkWmG97RB95RYGU5GWOZ-riZX3CaSzfSN65AxBCQZW_3SrVDqL1JnEWzdKcQCHGOj5RFa6KAkdF7R9hEo8gDpTnqQiJmlWHkWQ72AfPQ1J9Q_rku5XwlXa5DOSTF6qsRp7atbJ7hMCh19qmPMqkqdhYCKd09Db8weHxuKSX22MsjJe37Q1BYFw6s19ugyBfXw1)**

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6072aaa78bef4f30b276ad3439717928&_e=C8Dj-LV5Uyd4PZF1edWwDa2eTV1WCBLh9ZrMIhq102r-7ckjBS7hKROVmL-k0Sj8Wf3XqqkuQ88XJQ25wq2Geid70w0RQYU6NFuAheIwBUyTlU8lp5kV6re0i6xp1GIVKl2ng_7dEnhDbU4mKuokYgyXhsVrv1ocglyVEo4ITx9OQrblrt44MJ1YIwjEnWKK7accw0V2V1fra_qtx-5nACj4YpgySPixwia9WXKpjgSfmXouHLMyTxWw4-4DZjURq240oWNslfivZ_D2IlU_M3A-2weylGyEwmyUj9GbpcClzBrT0xNgQAKivOUEDutugRCT2kGzKfJ7wAB3_1lQ5ljBR801a-3YGSJnq67aIYGeKUlbZgz4HDNxX0MM1pCS0vITelVXcyabcM9Ksw7wSXFivVD0LW6cq7jDwljetpysPPOndPCqrwIEYWxF7BOimyatzEKVR4YaQt-RwE3XB0HHk4eqS9JawXBZ2ax4kw76d7WHTwz21clRDqAusjKa)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6072aaa78bef4f30b276ad3439717928&_e=C8Dj-LV5Uyd4PZF1edWwDa2eTV1WCBLh9ZrMIhq102r-7ckjBS7hKROVmL-k0Sj8Wf3XqqkuQ88XJQ25wq2Geid70w0RQYU6NFuAheIwBUyTlU8lp5kV6re0i6xp1GIVKl2ng_7dEnhDbU4mKuokYgyXhsVrv1ocglyVEo4ITx9OQrblrt44MJ1YIwjEnWKK7accw0V2V1fra_qtx-5nACj4YpgySPixwia9WXKpjgSfmXouHLMyTxWw4-4DZjURq240oWNslfivZ_D2IlU_M3A-2weylGyEwmyUj9GbpcDuFDGYmaXCEPHV1V8KvFAMomYlT66ldgvGwUrZVmxMwNcaPM_IE6lccecs38WEkqeRbymiGcOuTywvuhhR2da8KVf_sqMTQBhnK7MNaA4Fvdx5jedYjq3r2ssN2z5wRva-ur-CKBvA2kY_YuNNuFoFxvxoeP-J2ZKDgo_l8YjRfqi_gTdEU38IYnfNObzxFD0qQPGR0I1RSyAdNOXh_95c) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6072aaa78bef4f30b276ad3439717928&_e=C8Dj-LV5Uyd4PZF1edWwDa2eTV1WCBLh9ZrMIhq102r-7ckjBS7hKROVmL-k0Sj8Wf3XqqkuQ88XJQ25wq2Geid70w0RQYU6NFuAheIwBUyTlU8lp5kV6re0i6xp1GIVKl2ng_7dEnhDbU4mKuokYgyXhsVrv1ocglyVEo4ITx9OQrblrt44MJ1YIwjEnWKK7accw0V2V1fra_qtx-5nACj4YpgySPixwia9WXKpjgSfmXouHLMyTxWw4-4DZjURq240oWNslfivZ_D2IlU_M3A-2weylGyEwmyUj9GbpcDzfVYf-x8nOAkgh-xwmHmxM1L2x_4cSH-LWGAo056yQivnsAWYy3A4oNyjMd7axr0xXUW4ZfJ6gZvr7HjmAG35QvDWa5ifrmz-H3_UwKGVqg97L2UEwFgaTm2ZpcoZxeELmNPIu-VNe9kafXFgesVcl-CEj5u_oIEbYm6bYi7x9F0Oe8pZfHtk13mLIRxB27q4gImI1tMofxfYq55UdCxp)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Derek knows the fight for voting rights is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In case you missed it, House Democrats passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA) this week! This critical civil rights legislation would restore the integrity of the original Voting Rights Act and help combat voter restrictions across the country.

**But Derek knows this fight is far from over, and he needs your help to keep up the momentum.** That's why I'm reaching out today. As Derek's finance director, it's my job to make sure our team has the resources we need to keep Derek in Congress fighting for all of us.

Sometimes it's not the amount of money we raise that matters, but the strength of this grassroots campaign. That's why this month's goal is to bring in 500 new grassroots donations before the deadline, and I'm hoping Derek can count on your help.

**[I just ran the numbers, and we need 334 more grassroots donors to chip in before Tuesday's midnight deadline. Can Derek and I count on you to rush a donation of whatever you're able so we can meet our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/eUN333KtLVWFDpr23ZygQS4PQEYjP1S7KF77dWG54fk=/ELPtxlPLktkXjFVaXffGu0oGrC08TVk8mCj0C2e1COQ=?gpsid=50_115_20262&refcode=em21_210827_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210827_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__LH_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

name: Team Padilla
subject: Helping Afghan Refugees here in California
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
As the situation in Afghanistan continues to unfold, the U.S. must take immediate action to safely evacuate Americans, our Afghan allies, and the most vulnerable.
**We owe our Afghan allies who assisted U.S. troops over the last two decades a safe evacuation.**
But even once they make it out of Afghanistan, refugees have a long, difficult road ahead of them.
[**That’s why we are asking you to donate today to The International Rescue Committee, Opening Doors, and Jewish Family Services of San Diego — three organizations doing the important work of helping Afghan refugees get settled and get back on their feet here in California.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padilla-afghan-refugees?refcode=em210828-1-30&t=1&refcode2=258_159979_B3zkBO&akid=258%2E159979%2EB3zkBO)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padilla-afghan-refugees?refcode=em210828-1-30&t=2&refcode2=258_159979_B3zkBO&akid=258%2E159979%2EB3zkBO)**
**The International Rescue Committee** serves people whose lives have been upended by war, conflict, and natural disasters. They resettle refugees welcomed by the United States, helping them to succeed and thrive.
**Opening Doors** supports newcomers to the United States like refugees on their path to stability, self-sufficiency, and belonging. Through immigration legal services, refugee progress, and more, Opening Doors helps people from all over the world begin new lives here in California.
**Jewish Family Services of San Diego** supports recently arrived refugees in a number of ways; on any given day, they help families enroll their children in school, gain proficiency in English, learn to navigate banking systems, public transportation, and community resources, further their education, find permanent employment, and become contributing members of the community.
No matter who you are, being in a new place surrounded by people you don’t know is a very scary experience. So what we’re asking you to do today is to chip in whatever you can to make things easier for arriving refugees in California.
If you can afford it, please use this link to chip in today:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padilla-afghan-refugees**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padilla-afghan-refugees?refcode=em210828-1-30&t=3&refcode2=258_159979_B3zkBO&akid=258%2E159979%2EB3zkBO)
Thanks,
\- Team Padilla
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padilla-afghan-refugees?refcode=em210828-1-30&t=4&refcode2=258_159979_B3zkBO&akid=258%2E159979%2EB3zkBO)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=258%2E159979%2EB3zkBO)

subject: We want to send Biden a letter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Will you sign it? | ****
---
Fellow American,

Joe Biden is the worst president in history.

_He is taking zero responsibility for the way he is withdrawing our troops in Afghanistan - resulting in a TALIBAN takeover - and he's even blaming President Trump for it._

Do you think this is OK, Fellow American?

The reason Biden is passing blame to President Trump is pretty simple - he knows he has FAILED the American people and is floundering.

We want to send a letter to Joe Biden DEMANDING that he resigns as President of the United States IMMEDIATELY. Will you co-sign it for us?

**[Add your name NOW to DEMAND Joe Biden resign as President of the United States.>>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=995b7cc33ede421ab889cd2de5090ad7&_e=MVcRH4CXyzGSFJVjGDgvByHhWFUMsgTpsHY7wXPlKI-k_7jQDMXKveIXfVRP8kHN_VA08Hgh_hL4rj-yH4ZPhC2GoexU1Poe9-QtX02mYMUSk6HwmYRaAhYojSb2CdMZ9Hz0UW81YdSBG4bp22F8uiG4ulMFhCAVNdwfJhm3u3U3qxcO7JpvYdT2PkqOUJy_SM9VpGdcl9gAAJ8ads8f6rjV_TbpJtC8NA36aiGEmo9sp7YmO8i_SnAWkF0Xa8eGGo9X6hftVQlnSAmAOCuEpbLd5h739RCc-IWMhV5Hmk6Fjb2dQ7Oq4pB4s1hu_MLmlPb7UUF6557ZRs8QF-YjPs1Hf3F8m6gY5QSKOo_KygEgx_N5RdW4PxPGy3fKTBja03yk3ki8qDr8AbQtHNJ7QRti6-k54PLQJvjdquXlzD-PkGqUItG0wxi4EN2Kxy316OyY-YGfXw5zVRnvy6AXySEwEDhLHIsmDlh6JDEwxGQ%3D)**
