| _Dear Joe Biden,

Your decision to withdraw troops from Afghanistan and then blame President Trump for your terribly executed plan is despicable. As an American, I expect better.

As Commander-in-Chief, you have failed us and I DEMAND that you officially resign as President of the United States, effective immediately.

Sincerely,
Fellow American / A Patriotic American_

name: Patty Murray
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Mitch McConnell’s GOP and corporate interests will stop at nothing to take back control of the Senate -- because they do not want to see a government that actually works for its people.
#
Peter,
It may seem like we still have plenty of time before the 2022 election -- but the outcome of this election will determine our future, so we can’t waste a single day in the fight to keep the Senate.
Mitch McConnell’s GOP and corporate interests will stop at nothing to take back control of the Senate -- because they do not want to see a government that actually works for its people.
Just look at the American Rescue Plan -- _which passed without a single Republican vote._
In the Senate, I am focused on investing in affordable child care and a national paid leave program. I am working with Democrats to make higher education affordable, combat the climate crisis, create a public option for affordable health care, and so much more. But you and I both know that the Republicans would love nothing more than to block our progress on all of these issues.
**[With so much on the line in 2022, we can’t afford to fall behind, Peter. So before the big end-of-month deadline, I’m setting a $15,000 fundraising goal -- and I’m asking this grassroots team to help me reach it. Will you contribute $5 toward my goal now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34830388/303190288/944775873?refcode=pm_em_210828_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjIwYWRjMS01YTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKVFXriIGBGNuHdIoI_SFDOmnFv1SwTikMV-TFcRt0Q=)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34830389/303190289/944775873?refcode=pm_em_210828_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjIwYWRjMS01YTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bKVFXriIGBGNuHdIoI_SFDOmnFv1SwTikMV-TFcRt0Q=)**

**_“_**** _If they didn't do what they did that day – if they didn't have the courage to stand up – I don't know that we'd be living in a democracy today."_** This is the statement from the lawyer representing seven U.S. Capitol Police members who announced they will be suing Donald Trump and members of far-right extremist groups for their efforts to overthrow the government during the January 6th attacks. Three days ago, the House Select Committee investigating January 6th announced they will be obtaining relevant phone records from that day.
We know of at least one member of Congress who spoke with Donald Trump on the phone on January 6th: **Kevin McCarthy.** Team, we can’t let him continue to get away with these cover ups and lies. I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglFUDaMEPHpDy2Jc29k7couc39LQ3R3j7UlAzOTNvbXLMrtq7wdxNMIx4LqYHeNe6XYdqjBvuEHOb4etxkP93jOynHuqZJweMmkjCShC9o9XhRX3cNDto7OIcPf20xWXlrDNYgpb4I2bDvLuKkSbEDKwx6NQZ2NxgfPc0L4OU9Ye5fBRz3TccKNiiDwdfHBE0YWYExlVvaCQP526a7faYUCt)

Fellow Conservative,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglH5GFZdxxB2aDD1dIwxPVsFLkXjDntZnQ6bYDiLVsRvws-0sStq7RyUIikVn_MUc0LIeFUMwhJovAhV52wsE7Wzt6z2smQBOr3AFYdxH9CH4CnlW2DUk2w5zrpE-shtM348dGKXG4J5bKK12iLNzUEUp5ZjnaQZLp_AyGgtZIpel5Qv7ovNdt02spKvnPuZeijeec5EWTh4SD87ogpi12we)**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglEfHGvNBdv-12d9WZzJUw2J_FBy2k08pkvJZeuJrY_Q2AYduhif28gcmTaGvAwF3irrOUOR2PDJ5LI0DtOy7XSgwC1qMOocrd_6NVHmAXu-NdsNqbgro2_k_hec71YfaWoZu06ddj8i3T9qe9RgJPCaJ5VxHPHj1yDN05u0oxSs3UzHi5G9S-BLTTM4a5YjLdlmRcLJyms2eMxF8xwRZ1dq)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Fellow Conservative, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglGubIxCn05jstqLSEzt9WT311mR6cc8FP4gmkcT2LA5CZ7sa4TXv1FKzQMzyRZGLgW1lPHoOZKC5UobtCDBtix7fjorwGR-Gn1-gOSRpQhe2j_WEt3AVqJvjapt6qlsZjZLQ4uk5m-p-VMX4x_jln0XYMZh0uziBwYjE8-uspZhIaIz7svDXQmYIGAQZg_dXT0tghf1yKp1Ou3wcmnYFkhU) **

Fellow Conservative, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglHicPHEcpiRobWuXcerC_ugzJz86-c36Aq0bIJenhrDMt7GZWIX9_WTXoypTigduwJBYPCiA47c6jFYDTW2JPHPaB_XaQUYbHx98dNlb3m6DaQXQslnWLaA9NvMm1sV66kHDysVTZOQrnRG1SGQ7xLkgCjsThWnat6mXwHh55tshJU-XKYXl4oe0Z_MsldtnIXTBnpuQJhydp01xh3lVXaq)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=291523aae7674df2a15fb2d16bf3170a&_e=3x_YKRD3m5zM8v8RYg2zcZS9RmSEUMTHVv3maZQaYtNUJUnbGJF630RM4TEEmTD75ckIPKiPtqYn9n23zCDO7zvr_4ZSybGd39dpSsPJUzZD6npRuKmfqaqPWsaw_GRJ8fAYek7wXUY-54iJTU6xpYriBkF-REoO1t93vdD8Yh5X3uz2c5fuW4nWuxR4OiPdgF0l2TWRaa8jmo73UO5sYMq4fM_691mQLneaSb2oZC3rCHylUIfVyWU6VhM55QQ5h8YTexxGp-o06wNsG1jKG-7F48wiY6NRZRWpD1ZNglHbVITQPOELpZZ5WSDjmJ5X0hBmYmSLntkX_lqnB7eTCD5A9_v1KYjIthT37ClRYgNdh9JrEW9j0p2_iGr93GEH0fc66EHJzr1pZag6omzFh0jz_TOT30U_mTTv7jD6hz6kP-HPvVxWvmztSoHxzJD2_BWgfrwAkC8wRDb4-2uvl0XiuaHvw2d_d93w8zSwQoUGAP2H0NvaiaDq0Y3sLiDs)**

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: SURVEY: Are Republicans "white supremecists"?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

body:
Flipping this seat all comes down to this:
#
Peter,
In just a moment, we're going to respectfully ask you to [** _chip in your first-ever $5 to help close the gap on our goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund and elect John Fetterman to the Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28801?refcode=em20210828-2441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2441%2E434096%2E_nAasp)
Before we get to that, we think we owe you a quick explanation.
You see, with John leading the Democratic field + data showing him as the sole candidate on our side who can reliably defeat every Republican in a head-to-head matchup, we need to be planning for the long haul. Winning the general election and flipping this open Pennsylvania seat is a gigantic focus for our campaign right now, **so we're really counting on more folks like you from your state to chip in directly to the Flip Pennsylvania Fund before Tuesday at midnight.**
[**_So, if your budget allows, will you make your first $5 donation to John Fetterman's Flip Pennsylvania Fund so we can win this seat and add that pivotal 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28801?refcode=em20210828-2441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2441%2E434096%2E_nAasp)

We fully realize that most folks can't afford to contribute every time we ask. And we know these emails can start to pile up!
But we're asking again because it'd mean a whole lot to John, to Gisele, and our entire campaign if you'd consider contributing today. It's going to take *a looooot* of people chipping in to go the distance in this race, so we hope you'll add your first donation before Tuesday's big deadline:
[**_Peter, will you donate $5 to help close the gap on our goal for the Flip Pennsylvania Fund? We're really hoping to see an uptick in donations before our deadline, so we hope you'll chip in if you can swing it._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28801?refcode=em20210828-2441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2441%2E434096%2E_nAasp)

subject: The Breitbart Article | True the Vote Update
body:
Election Integrity News to Know | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e1bc746c6637/independence-day-newsletter-test-7232969?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c5f32bd3d5&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | August 28, 2021 Hi Friend -

Earlier this week, a document I'd written regarding one of our research projects made its way into **[an article published by Breitbart.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b2bd5e34b7&e=ad8cba7e98) **It is about ballot trafficking. The report is accurate. Ballot trafficking is one of three investigations undertaken by True the Vote in particular areas of interest. We have not spoken publicly of these investigations for various reasons, but primarily because the work is ongoing and time is short. What follows is a brief statement about the ballot trafficking project, why we did what we did, what we are finding, and what comes next. This is just the beginning. **___________________________________________**
**What We Did** In late 2020, True the Vote engaged a select team of contractors and set out to determine whether widespread ballot trafficking was occurring as part of an organized criminal enterprise. We'd watched the mass mail out of paper ballots to highly inaccurate voter records, the harried installation of ballot dropboxes privately funded by billionaire tech magnates, and the hundreds of legislative changes, lawsuits, and consent decrees that fundamentally altered election processes. All of it came together in 2020, under the fog of COVID. It was planned. It was purposeful. Having studied election process for decades, our team was well aware of the pitfalls associated with America's uniquely insecure approach to elections. We knew that attempts to prove certain types of election malfeasance would fail, so we chose instead to focus on the grifts that would necessarily leave trackable, provable data trails. To test our trafficking theory, we acquired over ten trillion location-based cell signals in major metropolitan areas across six states. Initially, we worked with whistleblowers and witnesses, but soon enough, the data alone told the tale. Using mobile and GPS data, we mapped the travel patterns of ballot traffickers to ballot dropboxes. This tracking method is explained in great detail by The New York Times in a series they ran called **[The Privacy Project.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a872bc8544&e=ad8cba7e98)** They and others have published much about how **[mobile data was used to track President Trump](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ca4df4f32f&e=ad8cba7e98) **and identify individuals at the **[January 6th event at the Capitol](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e64db8cada&e=ad8cba7e98).** Law enforcement uses this type of data routinely. So, lest anyone say we did anything untoward, let us be very clear, all of this data is regularly bought and sold, about all of us. **What We Found** Our findings reveal overwhelming evidence of ballot trafficking, **[some of which is highlighted in the article](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=92336d5c0e&e=ad8cba7e98)**. We have much more. All our research, including suspected locations where ballots were delivered, processed, and distributed, along with the individual devices associated, has been submitted in the form of a formal complaint, along with all data, to the FBI. Briefings have been provided to state law enforcement and political leadership in several states. These conversations will continue to broaden in the coming days. We've also acquired over a petabyte of video surveillance data. The quality of this video is inferior overall; lighting is bad, cameras are poorly positioned, timestamps are manipulated, key timeframes are often missing. Nevertheless, we are working video by video, using proprietary AI-based code we've written to screen the over 100,000 clips in our possession. The result? We are successfully finding video evidence that corroborates the digital data and supports the need for full investigations by law enforcement. Our novel approach offers never before seen insights into the exploitation of America's elections.

**Figure 1: 24-hour Route in Georgia **
_This person’s route included stops at 5 organizations and 27 individual ballot drop boxes, traveling across 6 counties. Red dots represent ballot drop boxes, blue house icons (circled) represent targeted organizations, blue line represents daily travel path_ **What Comes Next?** To date, law enforcement has not taken action. Make no mistake, what we have found will be made known. If law enforcement doesn't initiate investigations, we have plans to release all data, all video, publicly. So, that's where we are. This is a massive undertaking. And it continues. Once all six states are completed to the best of our ability, and if at that point law enforcement still has not acted, we will publicly release it all. How long will that take? Hard to say. We could release what we have now. And we may. But if it serves the greater good to hold on a while longer, then that's the option we will take. One way or another ballot trafficking will soon be exposed on a massive scale. The question is - what will Americans do about it? Many improvements must be made, but in the end, they all start with you - and with me - with each of us as citizens. Each of us must invest time and attention in elections. Where to begin? Well ... we know that bloated, inaccurate voter rolls are the fuel used to fire criminal manipulations of process. So, you can start by helping your county clean up its voter rolls. **We've built an app to automate citizen-led voter roll clean-up efforts called IV3**. The plan was to launch this week, but we've pushed it out a few more days to first share all of the above information with you. Next week, we'll launch the app. It will be the first in a series of tools and supports to help citizens' restore election integrity. Friends, this is it. It's time to roll up our sleeves and work. Set your mind now to serve in elections in your county. Once that's in order, reach out to others. True the Vote will be here to offer help every step of the way. We're all in this together - and working together we really can true the vote. All is not lost. Stay engaged.

For Freedom.
Ever onward -
---
|

body:
Just recently, Rep. Cori Bush threatened me live on CNN. Now, I'm asking you to sign my petition to have her investigated by Congress When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d050a0a442c548ba97c3a346293920a6&_e=AuHg9PcjQJMZU54tdRrHKHb4kwfFOlDzz6oo6Zn30or_SLy8h4RFaO2GzGek3dYGkUIXBcgNB8gDHUP9CE4DRuc4pygGHGGFYm5WUJrLoV9K8P9CeBKAt2Z2Eta-jsyMoDDNrOlaRQt8a526OJzoKYV3tEeN7vJlztoh_dYoAFsyK30_SaKM3waal-la-Ve2PiUrrwBdBZYy6GLC06m4RL3cR7Y5vBRpiVf-b1FB3tmrwM5mgHglg-HdFr6HmWbiBzE6ZM5KKLe1l-UcGqdODG70jmYkCu3_YDvk6xwt2k5kqI_ETrQ4IshjhBqwZZvvUddhWO3BVFF2NTdH6tjEg8XqWg46ANP3ue62oCJtYNfNJJ3Pv7a37ASCEbI3WfFJMiIY7k35uv2Y3BMydAcOMPRP3b17EaL_WfaZDbRE9HtylfEEyYjbwvUGDPWHJhTqxAeaMdoONHhbYE7GdQeLrldEeDLSrZ5qrecii2TtFXwQHaL8S89_TVZbOvU8vbIsBCa332GEJ330S5jp92mr7fRm3L5Ln5ctm1sT4A0vDzo9dQF3JrcxI1Lflp42oWmyyaVWgkxEGIpMR7NcUtDkRT6Xgl_hWHuc-9dCloQEBn2iXlFcSRCcSppfyyIdCAIX)
---

Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Recently, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d050a0a442c548ba97c3a346293920a6&_e=AuHg9PcjQJMZU54tdRrHKHb4kwfFOlDzz6oo6Zn30or_SLy8h4RFaO2GzGek3dYGkUIXBcgNB8gDHUP9CE4DRuc4pygGHGGFYm5WUJrLoV9K8P9CeBKAt2Z2Eta-jsyMoDDNrOlaRQt8a526OJzoKYV3tEeN7vJlztoh_dYoAFsyK30_SaKM3waal-la-Ve2PiUrrwBdBZYy6GLC06m4RL3cR7Y5vBRpiVf-b1FB3tmrwM5mgHglg-HdFr6HmWbiBzE6ZM5KKLe1l-UcGqdODG70jmYkCu3_YDvk6xwt2k5kqI_ETrQ4IshjhBqwZZvvUddhWO3BVFF2NTdH6tjEg8XqWg46ANP3ue62oCJtYNfNJJ3Pv7a37ASCEbI3WfFJMiIY7k35uv2Y3BMydAcOMMpvKr4gXpEN-t87x9wJrLb-SGM7ZUSdVNmUs9BiUkG3Z_PUuoBlvOrN3Xdcv9HvRuse31_8I_6ALDC8ilt0A33wKwvXr9iVjDDTZFVlQHczUXyRGEr7X141TkPxx5U1vtdUI52f3Sz7JcgxwUauWir-kIq3hcymjBABX2s72NkI3jMNP3t_qdoYqXvk2y1ETrAWK_DfXVlxaU5IR47xTJSt-LOsESs8_8tsQbsZ828G)
You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. **Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me.**

Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ _**absolute liar**_ ,” and informed me on live TV that “ _**my day will come**_.”

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d050a0a442c548ba97c3a346293920a6&_e=AuHg9PcjQJMZU54tdRrHKHb4kwfFOlDzz6oo6Zn30or_SLy8h4RFaO2GzGek3dYGkUIXBcgNB8gDHUP9CE4DRuc4pygGHGGFYm5WUJrLoV9K8P9CeBKAt2Z2Eta-jsyMoDDNrOlaRQt8a526OJzoKYV3tEeN7vJlztoh_dYoAFsyK30_SaKM3waal-la-Ve2PiUrrwBdBZYy6GLC06m4RL3cR7Y5vBRpiVf-b1FB3tmrwM5mgHglg-HdFr6HmWbiBzE6ZM5KKLe1l-UcGqdODG70jmYkCu3_YDvk6xwt2k5kqI_ETrQ4IshjhBqwZZvvUddhWO3BVFF2NTdH6tjEg8XqWg46ANP3ue62oCJtYNfNJJ3Pv7a37ASCEbI3WfFJMiIY7k35uv2Y3BMydAcOMGe5B3DhA2WgjBKju7l5efq49yH53GyyjCeAJ7F2Hzqa5ofyfdUVpEa-cwW6dQMbW3q47vkXJwe3CVRCbNG-Lv4cZ8pKpB_FrFAeihB3zLcWurcQHrB85o4orsQTy8IZudk1DLnCiUJST4gCl_GOewrxDJOW8alxCQJVBXGexIIZ2LZzd2BaQO7Cv7bKqMnpVlV-1zXvypJLX1bJa7f83_ts97nB0Vl8-M-bW_yt7I5o)
**[I’m calling for an investigation into Cori Bush’s threatening statements against me and my family, and I hope you’ll show your support for action to be taken against extremists who think the rules don’t apply to them.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d050a0a442c548ba97c3a346293920a6&_e=AuHg9PcjQJMZU54tdRrHKHb4kwfFOlDzz6oo6Zn30or_SLy8h4RFaO2GzGek3dYGkUIXBcgNB8gDHUP9CE4DRuc4pygGHGGFYm5WUJrLoV9K8P9CeBKAt2Z2Eta-jsyMoDDNrOlaRQt8a526OJzoKYV3tEeN7vJlztoh_dYoAFsyK30_SaKM3waal-la-Ve2PiUrrwBdBZYy6GLC06m4RL3cR7Y5vBRpiVf-b1FB3tmrwM5mgHglg-HdFr6HmWbiBzE6ZM5KKLe1l-UcGqdODG70jmYkCu3_YDvk6xwt2k5kqI_ETrQ4IshjhBqwZZvvUddhWO3BVFF2NTdH6tjEg8XqWg46ANP3ue62oCJtYNfNJJ3Pv7a37ASCEbI3WfFJMiIY7k35uv2Y3BMydAcOMLX6QrL15WFO1hr6sYzKOqBAaXnplvTFKRAZdJvZ-4Y2b15e7omTBO0AWovJ_Zp5hHi8JG5t4fim8sjx7hBw8CjoHZhPCOZ-TOJjWtFEBkKZ4bCzeNAxMBPom0v9KqHV0UWRc_QGbUTCzldBwptU8F-Y9lW5D1Oy0RTutsn5BFh8y2jaMawCiz_wZVmKZKHpZIXy3nV42TxCDgFpfP7q1u8HbsoHxOIsGcmkyhVNOLwb) **

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=RGwRib_fsXefZL-7EWZ7UNDtcpNVX_o6QePl_jVGOIbfpkBnxam7uQhb6VLExwPtWLqgRSuQAfP4-ouL8KgJ6_-tu_s2eXYCM0JMK5sRZkMjTTARNcoY6m0wo_YtQEMAyI_vu1oSZSWsYmIQC0Us8dvIJDJcAoT4I5bljL7sJNCsKS1RfaEabCo7Tl5VL8Ltca4ZH1tynNqbwiGB189M2_WvOvu-g2aik_BVKxom34I_YT4-C4j_uqGKivbCIaJVRcqcbrE0TpWo7lDOIALqArB3hvObJOrxHkxtKzBuUEg%3D) | |

**Pray 🙏**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=RGwRib_fsXefZL-7EWZ7UNDtcpNVX_o6QePl_jVGOIbfpkBnxam7uQhb6VLExwPtWLqgRSuQAfP4-ouL8KgJ6_Oi7YQcwS0zkVz2rLJmCAhmIk2iIn7l4GLuGqDsFa6cPFed6GUxPXTHtUauJfDpEp2IQAQ4u2YvPEqasOpNxuF6HexwFvJR8vOE9Pl2MCClkwWBbySrYQUVl9R2nT_48X-TYPmnElN3yuZojlubBYx2n-62brT-Kme65TiPK3aK83NaPmbL4mwAMakCxXBiMblA9PsSZuCZigaDziuwyCs%3D)
Thursday was the [deadliest day](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=TiSrwXRaZ7LCnxaGIhTK-Zn8LM714OxD_Vncf3GA_xnCtNQsO5Oz096CSzNyJ9y65_q_lf0FmB1tItg_MQ9nzIdlyyKPJi_q1Lu_An6TQXgG6uDXk3Hs4ZUIZA44Irzwop3LHM2UMeTcsgwYuCjrdlp22E0jnvjw8C2kAFDiWzHvv_oHSDwawVmmdnrR0IdqamYSWBMD6Kmtd0zozKOwWsdpehLGyn_jOqaS-jhwo2Tudx6OVPChWT587qh7GGzoFW8wK_Xa0cQrEtGKs2a-V1T-rfLdgmRI7abbJa6YvsppCIViBS6f2UftvQMpAZubavxjoDHwuC6UTGhgLz8l1-kRR5Y6juTrO6KD3Echvbwjc7ENl9r71NHvgdk3WEturClUkVIhj6XMU3J1bLI4admsHgiUkT2tLLWDBJNY3yHv6zhUzOMX7AdNDOqdHVdHQLXWy_SnXjenoWfzBiQM9j-rISy0PDSvmbaMXObiTXyxBTBtSRDafq-PLlhD-V9uagl-l9sbYMh9v8X0hXX3ihgf8XsUHzfUE3G573AvWwKpptb3JrWQd58Lnbcy6gZeJSP9TOeb7IhR8lFtQY8L-EtxpwPyLPt7FBaxRLk7u72lp4c0svPwpg9avWZn9qTRmr8eAtM4u3Tv-O8E8LZkd4F_sDQ9IHPiXw40oxjtHfbfjQNT82HcDBVBus_jY-vAiMcvdRYkROkGgKCbWpKb9WXbGJqvzru0fvDhkZdFuLm8jwZ-vw1fM-PNEWakiQyuJvzVpf59xhl8ZC6aNFrKgy4d2TqRySkCw3d1m61j0Htn4pSYWB6RRr9BkhwGc0HTcSdb7mBdUBHQ722tUbVJyg%3D%3D) for our military in more than a decade.

10 U.S. Marines.
2 soldiers.
1 Navy medic.

I pray for the families of these men and women who sacrificed so much to serve our country and died in the suicide bombings outside Kabul’s airport on Thursday. These losses always hit home in a profound way, but this one hits especially hard.

One of the lost soldiers was from our district. U.S. Army Staff Sgt. [Ryan Knauss](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=RGwRib_fsXefZL-7EWZ7UMnZMCnH7l1nxpSm_1WRjmnvpr4uhxmh7NUGuwn7rv-WRlEBNmAJ3Aix1YbJGM6FQMXKEq0a0yD2woTYQDRwBdQwFVyBEuSYqXjypu7B2ujQDmzjnJAQB_aSt8QSF1E6TDv60mvdEg5SN_5uUFvRqant--PBtaoSs-vjX8VWFN6BvizK9iLym7QXJoI26LXd3QElVITYRNJzaQ1y2Ct-p0xelA6yVM63U1pYOAf5bga5GP12C6W6bwNHVvUYOqlQxVgeN9h1Ed0AWKz6-eoapRq-m_SzcUAIiZjJ6OuIA3noSHbo-wvN_LIpRaduPYh-LKXSgmSdasuMSqaLvBox6ToV7n3sFZLmrOmMHnOMchRWtpUT2e9vshPDtNZaycydRxSWx38IS1_WFl2_kipYBuXzKywMUiN-DRJXKEms0fSyk20F8UMV0vCwDPSKz1x3Mw%3D%3D) was only 23 years old. He was a graduate of Gibbs High School and leaves behind his wife, Alena. Ryan wanted to be a Marine ever since he was a young child. In his second grade yearbook, he drew a picture of himself in uniform and the words “I want to be a Marine.” While Ryan ended up enlisting in the Army, that is the kind of commitment and national pride we can all learn from.

Ryan died helping people he didn’t know get to safety. That is what true heroism looks like. His sacrifice will never be forgotten. I pray for the Knauss family, for all our soldiers, and for our country.
|

**Tennessee Impresses on the World Stage 🤖**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=RGwRib_fsXefZL-7EWZ7UDvz6lD5E7EhT1e-FaCVtVMw807Iz4CwDilJWi4lCGc7_9B40fpEvzXl6A6VPgYXJyAUTzY9swUk6GoBLWSnQyJNTFfNHM7X_Sq8hwGCRR-g_2GPA52e0PkD5kXkeatKzps1hsFwGuO2yVf_nQd1mqsMK0wVkgZplOiN7Za-eP878bQQHYf28668E7s1dIfkh8aYNEWB6vDGj3ic2XDlznDI8jZFO2HsK9rNnf1afNeI-J3nb6oC3y6D4brfUO36G_JRktQjTHF6cacp3AmviY2tJE3z11blXso9JNWGtKI7)
This week, students from the University of Tennessee Knoxville travelled to Greenville, Texas to compete in the [2021 VEXU Robotics World Championship](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=769e6812bbeb470f89ea5f8f9f180513&_e=RGwRib_fsXefZL-7EWZ7UDvz6lD5E7EhT1e-FaCVtVMw807Iz4CwDilJWi4lCGc7_9B40fpEvzXl6A6VPgYXJyAUTzY9swUk6GoBLWSnQyJWpYKuXEWi5oUyqidxE6Yv_bVUCVrRSRVbdZKTg-fLsuyuIfHGObQ5VqrwuCPIek0XbQqp_U-Fm2y1SKQFNtAJZsJA5FrpiVfKKESgtJnY4zX6YeRtN_hjg0weFfvx3F2n646BVA74ursbvoHe3ohBER7JNChOSSjnq9wHUMeqtyyLruS6mnRwOavD-qT4qxnekWwNfhW-wWWDi6qRPnNu). The Tickle College of Engineering’s robotics team, YNOT, are now the reigning world champions.

The team’s founder and lead designer, Grant Kobes, launched the team four years ago. His goal was to create an opportunity for engineering students to gain hands-on experience with the engineering design process. Well, that goal has now earned this team recognition on an international level. **We congratulate this team for all of their hard work. You made Tennessee proud!**

body:
| | | We're shocked by what we just learned:

\-- Mark Kelly is now in danger of losing **Arizona**.
\-- Raphael Warnock is now in danger of losing **Georgia**.
\-- Catherine Cortez Masto is now in danger of losing **Nevada**.
\-- Maggie Hassan is now in danger of losing **New Hampshire**.

**And Republicans only need to unseat ONE of these Senators to destroy our Senate Majority.**

**[We know we ask a lot of you, but this is quite possibly our most urgent ask: We're calling for 13,500 Democrats to step up before our End of Month Deadline in 72 hours to PROTECT our House Majority, SAVE our Democratic Trifecta, and STOP a complete Republican takeover. We KNOW we can protect our Majority, but not if McConnell and the Republicans continue outraising us. Please, will you rush $5 to protect our House Majority in this critical moment? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)**

subject: Tell Congress to pass the For the People Act

body:
On the 58th anniversary of the March on Washington, we must recommit to our fight for progress.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34832683/303218273/1527970407?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-ftp-1&code=jtk196-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0ZjU1OC02OTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJXR9uAf7YnRlorAgWS6ywXjnFP3xBw8y0xytlWrvxM=&emci=d0b5f09c-4908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6224f558-6908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend, today is the 58th anniversary of the March on Washington. It was a monumental moment in the Civil Rights Movement – and thanks to leaders like Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and John Lewis, our nation took a huge step forward to ensure all people could fully participate in our democracy. **But now, extremist Republicans across the country are attacking our voting rights in an attempt to silence voters and undo all of our progress. And Arizona Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kelli Ward are making our state ground zero for voter suppression.**
Now that Democrats proved we could flip Arizona blue – winning this crucial state and giving us control of both the White House and the Senate – Arizona Republicans are unleashing some of the country's most outrageous voter suppression tactics to disenfranchise minority voters.

It's an anti-democratic disgrace – and we need to fight back immediately.
Luckily, we still have a chance at stopping these dangerous laws from taking effect. **We must channel our energy into passing the For the People Act in Congress – a package of reforms that will protect the right to vote across the country and transform our democracy for the better. But we're going to need your help to get it done. **
**[Friend, the GOP is afraid of what happens when your voice is heard. So I'm asking you to raise it, right now, in support of the For the People Act. But with time running out before our petition closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, we're still missing your name. So please, sign it NOW:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34832684/303218274/1527970407?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-ftp-1&code=jtk196-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0ZjU1OC02OTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJXR9uAf7YnRlorAgWS6ywXjnFP3xBw8y0xytlWrvxM=&emci=d0b5f09c-4908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6224f558-6908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6085109)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34832685/303218275/1527970407?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-ftp-1&code=jtk196-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI0ZjU1OC02OTA4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJXR9uAf7YnRlorAgWS6ywXjnFP3xBw8y0xytlWrvxM=&emci=d0b5f09c-4908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6224f558-6908-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6085109)
---
Thanks for fighting for a better future with me,

Marco Lopez

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Where I’ve been and why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d1dfdae2f0442148ab5cab45661818a&_e=Y1MLVXkAKih7LNZarongURI9_foYw8MhE2L_BSTI-xBQMoNqggEqQzzw_kKLXHXMDn7FkBacEPGFpahTBuhZEQDzfFLc_y-7ozOuiOAGq_72_8_yrnzJa3iRRZSTwiWasslvluZLk3RL1P3ioIMYt3tl5J8HnORBKfF5V6aRK7VVBXwLKBdYColIWyKN_VW2I6Z8ae-v1og7k-Rmw50Feq45QHCrmElDf1gUppVtAYlShBmeNm6F9YC-5A6xl9qnu_Y7ormUZM2AZ2wYYMY2HKhYrMMn_L3r4C0yDnBqACq-b-m2c3sbbOCimnvJtm1qwnbt8a79uITcNjhrgiceBbps8btvAALsapvcealZROM8BxxKYbWmVnht8oV5ruiZMFamLp6BRQTN-JVTaV5uj2QbcUh3uL9MfGBPsvhrgFQ%3D)

---
**Courageous and faithful** , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Peter, are one of those people.

**My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado.**

If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie.

_**Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be.**_

**But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize.** I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and [**I need your help to make sure their version of America never sees the light of day.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1d1dfdae2f0442148ab5cab45661818a&_e=Y1MLVXkAKih7LNZarongURI9_foYw8MhE2L_BSTI-xBQMoNqggEqQzzw_kKLXHXMDn7FkBacEPGFpahTBuhZEQDzfFLc_y-7ozOuiOAGq_72_8_yrnzJa3iRRZSTwiWasslvluZLk3RL1P3ioIMYt3tl5J8HnORBKfF5V6aRK7VVBXwLKBdYColIWyKN_VW2I6Z8ae-v1og7k-Rmw50FegZeXMX2XCQQj5eIcx2bluCz9sARJRl989pHIb0j6Z0nQnaGvgJakVo5RRzgtdgy3UI-5lzySLKwjgtfeYWGKCMxbFcUI_rY2kvhe8PMxRFm3tyeXXXb5JpgKEbg907UgpplBuM5vei0Ch9DUxYr2TPMi1lUUH0h-3r-HiJg_hVD-BGnJypy8PIHMVbVdzrwAE23eNUb0w6ErDlIyzk342I%3D)

Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and _**people like you and I must act.**_ **We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism.** We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled.

clean_body: Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. | Courageous and faithful , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Peter, are one of those people. My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado. If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie. Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be. But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize. I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and people like you and I must act. We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism. We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled. People used to elect wise individuals who they knew would strive to do the right thing, yet here we are with Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi corrupting everything they touch. We cannot balk in the face of extraordinary opposition, nor can we sit by and hope someone else will do the hard work for us. I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States, and right now I’m answering that call of duty, and We’re dealing with liberal Senators who care more about promoting riots and lining their own pockets, instead of bettering this nation. We need to put America first, and I need your help to do that. I’m not a politician, so asking for help isn’t something I take lightly. My years in the Army trained me to be self-sufficient and to ask for help only when it was needed most, I’m not asking for an arm and a leg, but I need your help to launch this campaign. I truly hope you’ll join me in winning back our nation. United we stand, divided we fall. For Freedom, Erik Aadland | | Paid for by AADLAND for Senate Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. subject: I’m sounding the alarm on Republican Ken Calvert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress
body:
Listen,

I’m sounding the alarm on MAGA Republican Ken Calvert:

✖ He voted to overturn the free and fair election of President Biden.
✖ He voted against COVID relief for millions of Americans.
✖ He’s openly against LGBTQ+ and immigrant rights.

For too long, Republican Rep. Ken Calvert has been able to hide in the shadows of the louder and prouder members of his MAGA caucus. Not anymore.

I’m running a grassroots campaign to bring better representation to CA-42, and to remove a dangerous MAGA Republican. Will you join this movement and chip in $3 before our end of month deadline? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df

We’re only 4 days away from the end of month. If I’m going to defeat Ken Calvert’s mountain of dark money, I MUST kick my ad campaign into overdrive on September 1st. But, I need $10,000 by August 31st to do that. Chip in $3 now! » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df

Look, Ken Calvert and I couldn’t be more different:

✔ I believe we should provide small businesses with the relief they need to hire workers and pay a fair wage.
✔ I believe we should expand access to quality and affordable healthcare and bring down the soaring costs of prescription drug pricing.
✔ I believe we should eliminate student loan debt and give all students the tools they need to succeed in the 21st Century economy.

With a slim majority in the House, all of those things are within reach. But we actually lost critical House seats in the last election. If we lose control of the House next year, we can kiss all of our progressive plans goodbye.

Look, we must fight harder than ever. So please, chip in $3 right now to help me defeat Ken Calvert >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CONTRIBUTE $3 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true]

CONTRIBUTE $7 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true]

Or a custom donation » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q32021_df?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10]

Thank you so much for your support.

Brandon Mosely

Democratic Candidate for Congress, CA-42

| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3bc16cd1d6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the voice of the grassroots movement sweeping America in every state – Election Integrity.

**From the start, I fought for election integrity paying for critical hearings out of pocket, I have fought to put America’s Audit on the map, and I have fought to keep it safe from personal, political, and legal attacks going all the way up to Merrick Garland and the Department of Justice. And now I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.**

**_And one by one, they have been defeated and America’s Audit has prevailed, one foot in front of the other._**

And this could not happen without you and me working together. This is why once again I must ask for your help.

**Right now, we are busy fighting the latest challenge, something fairly innocuously called:_NASS Task Force on Vote Verification: Post-election Audit Recommendations._**

Before I dive into this particularly nasty piece of propaganda, I need you to understand something.

We are up against a critical deadline by September first. [While we have raised a tremendous amount of support over the last few days, we are still $8,400 shy of reaching our fundraising goal. We are THIS close.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ab2d59477f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5d7e3e129e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We need to raise this money to mobilize support, promote America’s Audit and results while we are being silenced by mainstream media, and to make sure our campaign has the infrastructure to weather the attacks that WILL come from all sides – everyone who opposes the sanctity of American Election Integrity!**

[_And this is why I must again ask for your help. Please make a contribution today to ensure that the Election Integrity movement stays strong!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6d84e39e3d&e=44b8c466b0)

First, let me make clear exactly what the responsibilities of Secretary of State are. Here are a few:
* Act as “Chief Election Officer”
* Certify statewide election results
* Record campaign finances of candidates

You might notice that the position is centered around keeping elections free and fair.

**Well, as future “Chief Election Officer” of Arizona, let me tell you what the Secretary of States are trying to do, in almost unison, to squash election integrity.**

The explicit goal of the NASS Task Force on Vote Verification was to ensure that nothing like “a Maricopa-Style Forensic Audit would ever happen again.”

**Why?**

I will continue to challenge this: Why is a third-party independent audit overseen by the legislative such a bad thing? This is an explicit duty of the legislative.

**Nonetheless, one thing is clear. It is the job of the Secretary of State to protect elections, not prevent them from falling under the scrutiny of the people.**

_This is America. This is a Democracy. This is not the tyranny of a cabal of partisan Secretary of States too scared to have the people take a second look at how shoddily they are running their elections!_

**Preventing Maricopa-style audits does one thing really well: it obscures the fact that there are several really good measures to reduce the need for audits to begin with:**
* **Defect elimination**
* **Multi-factor authentication**
* **Ballot fraud countermeasures.**

Instead, the executive Secretaries of State decided that it was their prerogative to override the duty of the Legislative and the right of the People to oversee the elections.

This joint statement reads:

_The NASS Task Force on Vote Verification encourages states to consider the following recommendations for all types of post-election audits:_

_● States should have a requirement and timeframe, ideally in state statute, for post-election audits in place prior to an election. These defined requirements should include conducting the audit as soon as reasonably possible after an election, as well as a process to recertify election results based on the results of the audit._

_● Ensuring chain of custody procedures throughout the post-election audit process is paramount. Election officials should be able to track the movement and transport of ballots, voting machines, and other election materials through witnesses, signature logs, security seals, video, etc. A break in the chain of custody increases the risk that the integrity or reliability of the asset cannot be restored. The EAC Chain of Custody Best Practices document and CISA Chain of Custody and Critical Infrastructure Systems document should be used as a reference when establishing these procedures._

_● Have state and/or local election officials be an integral part of the post-election audit process, including in the selection of the precincts or equipment to be audited. The involvement of any third-party entities, like a CPA firm, should be determined by the Chief State Election Official or state legislative act prior to an election, and those entities must work closely with election officials._

_● The post-election audit methods and processes must be transparent. This includes identifying who may observe the audit, which should include members of the public, media, political party and/or candidate representatives. Once the results of the post-election audit are completed and certified, they should be made publicly accessible consistent with state law._

_● To avert the possibility of voting systems becoming unusable, states should have criteria in place prior to an election for the use of a federally or a state accredited test lab to perform any audit of voting machine hardware or software._

_● States should make every effort to educate the public on their post-election audit process, as well as other processes and procedures in place to ensure the accuracy and public trust of the results._

**In effect, what these recommendations do is force the People and the Legislative to let the government try and hold itself accountable.**

_This means that in the event of fraud, the expectation of the people should be that the people who are trying to STEAL the election are the same ones who should hold themselves accountable._

**This is ridiculous. This is like the National Association of Bank Robbers coming together to claim that Bank Robbers shouldn’t be arrested, they should hold each other accountable to not rob any more banks.**

This is on its face absurd, and this is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona.

**The Secretaries of State agreed on this almost unanimously, which means that almost every Secretary of State in America thinks it is the prerogative of the Secretary of State to take power from the people.**

_I want to represent the people and give power back to the people, which is what I have been fighting for every single day!_

**But nevertheless, we are under attack once again in Maricopa and the Left is trying to squash all possibilities of a nationwide audit in every state.**

[We need to get the word out on the Audit, and fast. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a40ee5a19b&e=44b8c466b0) We need resources to protect our campaign from outside attacks. We need to mobilize volunteers. And this takes your continued support.

[_Please donate GENEROUSLY today to support the Election Integrity movement and fight off this next attack. Help us reach our goal of $8,400 by the end of the month!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a585273ec1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f74143f3b7&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=88d91aea91&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
